This framework explains why helices are non-generic in polymer collapse, identifies the physical ingredients required for their stabilization, and provides testable predictions for when helical and chiral condensates should emerge.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现螺旋结构不是聚合物塌缩的普遍结果，提出了两种无需生物化学特异性的最小物理机制来稳定螺旋结构：几何空间约束和周期性"粘性"相互作用。
AI.motivation: 传统聚合物塌缩理论通常产生球状、环状或棒状结构，而螺旋结构在仅考虑弯曲弹性和各向同性内聚力的最小理论中通常不存在。本文旨在解释螺旋结构如何在无需生物化学特异性的情况下稳定存在。
AI.method: 提出了两种物理上不同的最小机制：(A) 几何空间约束：结合管状堆积（厚度）约束和一般吸引力，选择具有有限半径和螺距的理想螺旋堆积；(B) 周期性"粘性"相互作用：在固定轮廓距离m处的单体之间周期性吸引，强制相互作用间距与链几何结构之间的匹配。
AI.result: 推导了螺旋半径和螺距、曲率和弯曲能、接触距离约束以及向环状和棒状形态转变条件的解析关系，这些关系用持久长度Lp、相互作用强度和链长N表示。解释了为什么螺旋在聚合物塌缩中不普遍，并确定了稳定螺旋所需的物理要素。
AI.conclusion: 该框架解释了螺旋结构在聚合物塌缩中的非普遍性，确定了稳定螺旋所需的物理要素，并为螺旋和手性凝聚态何时出现提供了可测试的预测。左右手螺旋在自由能上完全简并，因此手性可以在没有显式手性相互作用的情况下自发出现。

title: Cs$_3$V$_9$Te$_{13}$: A Correlated Electron System with Topological Flat Bands
summary: Correlated electron systems with topological flat bands show great promise in exploring exotic quantum phenomena. However, such crystalline materials remain rare. Here we report the discovery of a novel material, Cs$_3$V$_9$Te$_{13}$, which unexpectedly exhibits magnetism and significant electron correlations. The crystal structure features two interpenetrating sets of vanadium triangles that can be linked with an ideal kagome lattice. The physical property measurements demonstrate a cascade of correlated electron phenomena, including quasi-two-dimensional bad metal, non-Fermi-liquid behavior, antiferromagnetic spin-density-wave transition at $T_\mathrm{N}$ = 47 K, possible short-range spin ordering at $\sim$350 K, a large Sommerfeld coefficient of 246 mJ mol-fu$^{-1}$ K$^{-2}$, and pressure-induced quantum criticality. These correlated electron behaviors are associated with the topological flat bands at the Fermi level, the latter of which are generated from the V2 sublattice in terms of a bipartite kagome model. Our findings establish Cs$_3$V$_9$Te$_{13}$ as a brand new correlated matter that synergistically combines flat-band physics and tunable properties.

AI.tldr: 在Cs₃V₉Te₁₃中发现新型关联电子材料，具有拓扑平带、磁性及多种关联电子现象，包括非费米液体行为、反铁磁自旋密度波转变和压力诱导量子临界性。
AI.motivation: 具有拓扑平带的关联电子系统是探索奇异量子现象的重要平台，但此类晶体材料非常罕见。本研究旨在发现新型材料，结合平带物理与可调性质。
AI.method: 通过晶体结构分析发现Cs₃V₉Te₁₃具有两套互穿钒三角形结构，可关联到理想kagome晶格。进行物理性质测量，包括电输运、磁性和比热测量，并施加压力研究量子临界行为。
AI.result: 发现材料呈现准二维坏金属、非费米液体行为、47K反铁磁自旋密度波转变、~350K可能的短程自旋有序、大索末菲系数(246 mJ mol-fu⁻¹ K⁻²)和压力诱导量子临界性。这些行为与费米能级处的拓扑平带相关。
AI.conclusion: Cs₃V₉Te₁₃是一种全新的关联电子材料，协同结合了平带物理和可调性质，为探索拓扑平带系统中的奇异量子现象提供了新平台。

title: Channeling-in channeling-out revisited: selected area electron channeling and electron backscatter diffraction
summary: Scanning electron microscopy combined with electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) and electron channeling provides rich crystallographic contrast, but the mutual influence of channeling-in and channeling-out is often simplified or neglected in quantitative analyses. In this work, we use selected-area electron channeling patterns (SA-ECPs) acquired from a single-crystal silicon wafer while recording an EBSD pattern at every incident beam direction, thereby directly probing how channeling-in affects the EBSD signal. We show that common Hough-based quality metrics (pattern quality, band contrast, and band slope), pattern-matching cross-correlation coefficients, and Fourier-based signal-to-noise ratios all exhibit strong crystallographic modulations that follow the underlying ECP, in both raw and background-corrected patterns. Similar wide-angle channeling features are also visible in conventional, low-magnification EBSD maps, indicating that channeling-in effects are relevant under routine mapping conditions and not only in specialized ECP experiments. These observations highlight that channeling-in can significantly bias quality-based interpretation of EBSD data, with consequences for methods such as pattern blurring analysis, high-resolution strain mapping, and emerging statistical or machine-learning approaches that rely on subtle variations in diffraction patterns. The combined SA-ECP and EBSD strategy presented here offers a practical framework to visualize and potentially control channeling-in/channeling-out coupling in the SEM, suggesting new routes to design experiments and detector configurations that either mitigate or intentionally exploit these dynamical effects.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过结合选区电子通道花样（SA-ECP）和电子背散射衍射（EBSD），直接探测了通道效应如何影响EBSD信号，发现多种质量指标均受晶体学调制影响，这些效应在常规EBSD映射中也存在，可能影响数据解释。
AI.motivation: 扫描电子显微镜中的电子通道效应（channeling-in和channeling-out）在定量分析中常被简化或忽略，但其对EBSD信号的相互影响尚未得到充分研究，需要直接实验验证这些效应如何影响EBSD数据质量指标。
AI.method: 使用单晶硅片，在记录每个入射束方向的EBSD图案的同时采集选区电子通道花样（SA-ECPs），直接探测通道效应对EBSD信号的影响。分析多种质量指标：基于Hough变换的质量指标（图案质量、带对比度、带斜率）、图案匹配互相关系数和基于傅里叶变换的信噪比。
AI.result: 所有分析的质量指标都显示出强烈的晶体学调制，遵循底层ECP结构，这些效应在原始和背景校正后的图案中都存在。类似的宽角度通道特征在常规低倍率EBSD映射中也可见，表明通道效应在常规映射条件下相关，不仅限于专门的ECP实验。
AI.conclusion: 通道效应可能显著偏倚基于质量的EBSD数据解释，影响图案模糊分析、高分辨率应变映射以及依赖衍射图案细微变化的统计或机器学习方法。提出的SA-ECP和EBSD组合策略为可视化和控制SEM中的通道效应提供了实用框架，为设计实验和探测器配置提供了新途径。

title: Pattern of the Tc(p) dependence with huge "anomaly 1/8" - in new property observed in La2-xBaxCuO4 and YBa2Cu3O6+delta at room temperature
summary: Cuprate HTSCs exhibit a dome-shaped dependence of the superconducting transition temperature on the charge carrier concentration, Tc(p), with a maximum at p = 0.16. Near the composition p = 1/8, a dip in Tc is observed (the "1/8 anomaly"), which is associated with charge and spin ordering in the CuO2 planes. By investigating the hydration process of La2-xBaxCuO4 and YBa2Cu3O6+delta conducted at room temperature (RT) and under the influence of a high-frequency magnetic field, we have discovered unusual weight changes in HTSC samples during the initial stage of hydration. For both studied compounds, the dependence of weight changes on the concentration p was found to almost exactly replicate the patterns of the corresponding Tc(p) dependencies, including the "1/8 anomaly". Such a manifestation of characteristic low-temperature features of HTSC systems at RT is intriguing. The results of this experimental work will be useful for the further development of HTSC theories.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现高温超导材料在室温水合过程中，重量变化与超导转变温度Tc随载流子浓度p的变化关系惊人相似，包括1/8异常现象。
AI.motivation: 研究高温超导材料中Tc(p)的穹顶形依赖关系和1/8异常现象，这些现象与CuO2平面中的电荷和自旋有序有关，探索这些低温特征在室温条件下的表现。
AI.method: 在室温和高频磁场影响下，研究La2-xBaxCuO4和YBa2Cu3O6+δ的水合过程，测量样品在初始水合阶段的重量变化。
AI.result: 发现两种化合物的重量变化随浓度p的依赖关系几乎完全复制了相应的Tc(p)依赖模式，包括1/8异常现象，表明低温超导特征在室温条件下也有表现。
AI.conclusion: 高温超导系统在室温下表现出与低温超导特性相似的特征，这一发现对高温超导理论的进一步发展具有重要意义。

title: Hunting for quantum advantage in electronic structure calculations is a highly non-trivial task
summary: In light of major developments over the past decades in both quantum computing and simulations on classical hardware, it is a serious challenge to identify a real-world problem where quantum advantage is expected to appear. In quantum chemistry, electronic structure calculations of strongly correlated, i.e. multi-reference problems, are often argued to fall into such category because of their intractability with standard methods based on mean-field theory. Therefore, providing state-of-the-art benchmark data by classical algorithms is necessary to make a decisive conclusion when such competing development directions are compared. We report cutting-edge performance results together with high accuracy ground state energy for the Fe$_4$S$_4$ molecular cluster on a CAS(54,36) model space, a problem that has been included quite recently among the list of systems in the {\it Quantum Advantage Tracker} webpage maintained by IBM and RIKEN. Pushing the limits even further, we also present CAS-SCF based orbital optimizations for unprecedented CAS sizes of up to 89 electrons in 102 orbitals [CAS(89,102)] for the Fe$_5$S$_{12}$H$_4^{5-}$ molecular system comprising twenty five open shell orbitals in its sextet ground state and an active spaces size of 331 electrons in 451 orbitals. We have achieved our results via mixed-precision spin-adapted \textit{ab initio} Density Matrix Renormalization Group (DMRG) electronic structure calculations interfaced with the ORCA program package and utilizing the NVIDIA Blackwell graphics processing unit (GPU) platform. We argue that DMRG benchmark data should be taken as a classical reference when quantum advantage is reported. In addition, full exploitation of classical hardware should also be considered since even the most advanced DMRG implementations are still in a premature stage regarding utilization of all the benefits of GPU technology.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过先进的DMRG方法在经典GPU硬件上实现了对强关联量子化学系统的高精度计算，为量子优势的评估提供了重要的经典基准数据。
AI.motivation: 随着量子计算和经典硬件模拟的快速发展，需要识别真正能体现量子优势的实际问题。在量子化学中，强关联多参考问题由于难以用标准平均场方法处理，被认为是可能展示量子优势的领域。因此，提供最先进的经典算法基准数据对于比较量子与经典计算的发展方向至关重要。
AI.method: 采用混合精度自旋适应的从头算密度矩阵重整化群（DMRG）电子结构计算方法，与ORCA程序包接口，并利用NVIDIA Blackwell GPU平台。实现了CAS(54,36)和CAS(89,102)等前所未有的活性空间尺寸计算。
AI.result: 获得了Fe4S4分子簇在CAS(54,36)模型空间中的高精度基态能量和尖端性能结果。进一步实现了Fe5S12H45-分子系统的CAS-SCF轨道优化，活性空间达到89个电子在102个轨道[CAS(89,102)]，包含25个开壳层轨道和331个电子在451个轨道的活性空间尺寸。
AI.conclusion: DMRG基准数据应作为报告量子优势时的经典参考标准。同时，应充分利用经典硬件的潜力，因为即使最先进的DMRG实现在利用GPU技术优势方面仍处于初级阶段。这些结果为评估量子计算在强关联化学问题上的优势提供了重要的比较基准。

title: Pulgon-tools: A toolkit for analysing and harnessing symmetries in quasi-1D systems
summary: Pulgon-tools is an open-source software package providing building blocks for the analysis and modeling of quasi-one-dimensional (quasi-1D) periodic systems based on line-group theory. While mature libraries exist for space-group detection in three-dimensional crystals, an automated and structure-based identification of line groups has so far been lacking. We present software that integrates four complementary components within a consistent line-group framework: (i) structure generation, (ii) symmetry detection, (iii) irreducible representations (irreps) and character table and (iv) harmonic interatomic force constants (IFCs) correction. This paper introduces the general code structure and several examples that illustrate some relevant applications of the program.

AI.tldr: Pulgon-tools是一个开源软件包，为基于线群理论的准一维周期系统分析和建模提供构建模块，填补了自动线群识别的空白。
AI.motivation: 虽然三维晶体的空间群检测已有成熟库，但基于结构的线群自动识别一直缺乏。需要开发一个集成的软件工具来分析和建模准一维周期系统。
AI.method: 开发了一个包含四个互补组件的软件包：1）结构生成，2）对称性检测，3）不可约表示和特征表，4）谐波原子间力常数修正。这些组件在线群框架内保持一致。
AI.result: 成功开发了Pulgon-tools软件包，提供了准一维周期系统分析的完整工具链。论文介绍了代码的一般结构和几个应用示例。
AI.conclusion: Pulgon-tools填补了准一维系统线群分析工具的空白，为相关领域研究提供了重要的软件支持，有助于推进准一维材料的理论研究和计算建模。

title: Ground-State Selection by Pure Energy Relaxation in Polariton Condensates
summary: We study nonequilibrium mode selection in dissipative exciton-polariton condensates incoherently pumped through an excitonic reservoir in the presence of pure energy relaxation. For a confined system in which a vortex mode is selected at threshold, we show that energy relaxation qualitatively changes the condensation scenario: as the pump increases, the asymptotic state evolves from a vortex condensate to a rotating mixed state and then to a ground-state condensate. Pure energy relaxation thus destabilizes condensation into excited states and promotes ground-state selection.

AI.tldr: 研究非平衡模式选择：在纯能量弛豫下，激子-极化子凝聚体从涡旋态演变为混合态再到基态，能量弛豫促进基态选择
AI.motivation: 研究耗散激子-极化子凝聚体在非相干泵浦下的非平衡模式选择问题，特别关注纯能量弛豫对凝聚态选择的影响
AI.method: 在激子库非相干泵浦的受限系统中，研究存在纯能量弛豫时的凝聚动力学，分析从涡旋模式到混合态再到基态凝聚的演化过程
AI.result: 能量弛豫显著改变凝聚场景：随着泵浦强度增加，渐近态从涡旋凝聚演变为旋转混合态，最终变为基态凝聚，纯能量弛豫破坏激发态凝聚并促进基态选择
AI.conclusion: 纯能量弛豫对非平衡模式选择具有关键作用，它通过破坏激发态凝聚的稳定性来促进基态凝聚的选择，这为控制极化子凝聚的拓扑态提供了新途径

title: Entropy Production Rate in Stochastically Time-evolving Asymmetric Networks
comment: Main: 5 pages including 3 figures. Supplemental Material: 23 pages including 9 figures
summary: Fluctuations in parameters that are typically treated as fixed play a crucial role in the behavior of complex systems. However, to date, we lack a general non-equilibrium thermodynamic treatment of such a complex system. In this Letter, to address this problem, we develop a framework in which fluctuating interactions between units of nonlinear network systems are modeled as uncorrelated colored noise (i.e., annealed disorder) with a correlation time. This approach enables us to quantify how the entropy production rate (EPR) depends on both the characteristic time-scale and the strength of the disorder. Using dynamical mean field theory, we derive an exact expression for EPR at any transient time that is validated by simulations of the full non-linear dynamics. At stationarity, a relation between EPR and autocorrelation is established and then used to analytically study the particular case of linear systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一个非平衡热力学框架，将非线性网络系统中单元间的波动相互作用建模为具有相关时间的非相关有色噪声，从而量化熵产率如何依赖于无序的特征时间尺度和强度。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统中通常被视为固定的参数波动对系统行为至关重要，但目前缺乏对此类复杂系统的一般非平衡热力学处理方法。
AI.method: 将非线性网络系统中单元间的波动相互作用建模为具有相关时间的非相关有色噪声（即退火无序），使用动力学平均场理论推导熵产率的精确表达式。
AI.result: 推导出任意瞬态时间的熵产率精确表达式，并通过完整非线性动力学模拟验证；在稳态下建立了熵产率与自相关的关系，并用于解析研究线性系统的特殊情况。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功量化了熵产率对无序特征时间尺度和强度的依赖性，为非平衡复杂系统中波动相互作用的热力学分析提供了理论基础。

title: Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless Quantum Supercriticality in XXZ Heisenberg Spin Chain
summary: Quantum fluctuations can give rise to a singular quantum critical point (QCP) in the ground state, whose influence extends to finite temperatures, forming a quantum critical regime (QCR). Recently, it has been shown that in the quantum Ising model, the symmetry-breaking, longitudinal field can induce a quantum supercritical regime (QSR) emanating from the QCP, which hosts a universally enhanced quantum supercritical magnetocaloric effect (MCE). In this paper, we show that the QSR also emerges in the spin-1/2 XXZ model, in both the form of Ising and Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) supercriticality. Using ground-state and finite-temperature tensor-network methods, we investigate quantum supercritical phenomena near a BKT QCP. We reveal a quantum supercritical crossover scaling $T \propto h^{2/3}$ and a Grüneisen ratio scaling $Γ_h \propto T^{-3/2}$ for the BKT QCP, which differ from the corresponding Ising supercritical scalings. Nevertheless, we find that the scaling function $φ_Γ(x)$ of the singular Grüneisen ratio for both BKT and Ising cases can be approximately described by the same expression $φ_Γ(x) \approx x/(1+x^2)$. Our work extends the study of quantum supercritical phenomena from the Ising to the XXZ Heisenberg model, thereby revealing the presence of BKT quantum supercriticality and broadening the scope of quantum supercritical physics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了XXZ模型中BKT量子超临界现象，揭示了不同于Ising模型的超临界标度行为，但发现两者Grüneisen比标度函数具有相同近似表达式。
AI.motivation: 量子临界点(QCP)可以产生量子临界区(QCR)，最近在量子Ising模型中发现了纵向场诱导的量子超临界区(QSR)具有增强的磁热效应。本文旨在探索XXZ模型中是否也存在类似现象，特别是BKT类型的量子超临界性。
AI.method: 使用基态和有限温度的张量网络方法，研究BKT量子临界点附近的量子超临界现象。分析量子超临界交叉标度行为和Grüneisen比标度。
AI.result: 发现XXZ模型中存在BKT量子超临界性，揭示了BKT QCP的量子超临界交叉标度T∝h^{2/3}和Grüneisen比标度Γ_h∝T^{-3/2}，这些标度与Ising超临界标度不同。但发现两种情况的奇异Grüneisen比标度函数φ_Γ(x)都可以用相同近似表达式φ_Γ(x)≈x/(1+x^2)描述。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将量子超临界现象的研究从Ising模型扩展到XXZ海森堡模型，揭示了BKT量子超临界性的存在，拓宽了量子超临界物理的研究范围。

title: The switching of bipolar and unipolar magnetostriction in polycrystalline ZnO film
summary: We report the investigation of magnetostrictive property of polycrystalline ZnO film at room temperature on rotating a magnetic field in the plane of the film from 0 deg to 90 deg by an indigenously developed optical cantilever beam magnetometer (CBM) setup. In this study, the film exhibits bipolar (tensile & compressive) and unipolar (tensile/compressive) nature of magnetostriction with the angle of rotation of in-plane magnetic field. Moreover, we observe switching behavior of bipolar and unipolar magnetostriction as the applied field is rotated in the plane of the film. The switching of magnetostriction is attributed to the crystal anisotropy of the material. The appearance of bipolar and unipolar magnetostriction has made the ZnO film a suitable candidate for the fabrication of sensors as well as actuators applicable in micro and nano-electronic devices.

AI.tldr: 研究室温下多晶ZnO薄膜在面内旋转磁场（0-90度）中的磁致伸缩特性，发现其具有双极性和单极性磁致伸缩行为，并观察到随磁场旋转的切换现象。
AI.motivation: 研究ZnO薄膜的磁致伸缩特性，探索其在微纳电子器件中作为传感器和执行器的应用潜力。
AI.method: 使用自主研发的光学悬臂梁磁强计（CBM）装置，在室温下测量多晶ZnO薄膜在面内旋转磁场（0-90度）中的磁致伸缩特性。
AI.result: ZnO薄膜表现出双极性（拉伸和压缩）和单极性（拉伸/压缩）磁致伸缩行为，且随着面内磁场的旋转，观察到双极性和单极性磁致伸缩的切换现象。
AI.conclusion: ZnO薄膜的双极性和单极性磁致伸缩特性使其成为微纳电子器件中传感器和执行器制造的合适候选材料，磁致伸缩的切换归因于材料的晶体各向异性。

title: Structured reformulation of many-body dispersion: towards pairwise decomposition and surrogate modeling
summary: We present a structured reformulation of the many-body dispersion (MBD) model that enables a physically consistent decomposition of forces into pairwise components. By introducing a many-body correlation matrix that scales dipole-dipole interactions, we derive unified expressions for the MBD energy, force, and Hessian. This reformulation reveals a natural structure for pairwise force decomposition and provides a promising foundation for interpretable analysis and machine learning surrogate modeling of MBD interactions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结构化的多体色散(MBD)模型重构方法，能够将力物理一致地分解为成对分量，为可解释分析和机器学习代理建模提供了基础。
AI.motivation: 多体色散(MBD)模型在描述分子间相互作用时很重要，但传统的MBD模型难以将力分解为成对分量，限制了其可解释性和在机器学习中的应用。
AI.method: 通过引入一个缩放偶极-偶极相互作用的多体相关矩阵，推导出MBD能量、力和Hessian的统一表达式，实现了力的成对分解。
AI.result: 成功实现了MBD力的物理一致成对分解，揭示了力的自然结构，为可解释分析和机器学习代理建模提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该结构化重构方法不仅实现了MBD力的成对分解，还为理解多体色散相互作用和开发高效的机器学习模型提供了有前景的框架。

title: Frequency Comb of Electric-Polarization Waves
summary: Frequency combs are a spectrum of equally spaced frequency components with very high time-frequency accuracy, which have been widely used in the optical and microwave frequency ranges. We propose the realization of a frequency comb operating at the terahertz regime in terms of the nonlinear dynamics of electric-polarization waves, or ferrons as their quanta, in the ferroelectric materials. The efficiency of the frequency comb of the electric-polarization waves is exactly proportional to the static electric polarization carried by the ferron modes, which thereby offers new opportunities for the direct observation and application of the intrinsic properties of ferrons.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出在铁电材料中利用电极化波的非线性动力学实现太赫兹频率梳，其效率与铁子模式携带的静态电极化成正比。
AI.motivation: 频率梳在光学和微波频段已有广泛应用，但在太赫兹频段实现频率梳具有重要价值。铁电材料中的电极化波（铁子）的非线性动力学为实现太赫兹频率梳提供了新途径。
AI.method: 利用铁电材料中电极化波（铁子）的非线性动力学特性，通过铁子模式的静态电极化来实现太赫兹频率梳的生成。
AI.result: 提出的太赫兹频率梳效率与铁子模式携带的静态电极化成正比，这为直接观测和应用铁子的本征特性提供了新机会。
AI.conclusion: 铁电材料中的电极化波非线性动力学为实现太赫兹频率梳提供了可行方案，该方案不仅扩展了频率梳的应用频段，还为研究铁子的基本特性开辟了新途径。

title: Conditional KPZ reduction in a one-dimensional model of bosonic dark matter
summary: Wave-like dark matter described by a high-occupancy self-gravitating bosonic field provides a microscopic setting in which both amplitude and phase are dynamical. We study a one-dimensional Gross--Pitaevskii--Poisson toy model and ask which coarse-grained variable, if any, can be meaningfully compared with the 1+1-dimensional Kardar--Parisi--Zhang (KPZ) fixed point. We show that the relevant field is not the raw microscopic phase but a branch-resolved coarse-grained phase built from the sound sector. Above the Jeans scale and below the microscopic cutoff, self-gravity acts as a weak deformation of local sound dynamics. In this window the exact linear modes admit a local sound form, and a weakly nonlinear projection yields a nonvanishing same-chirality Burgers self-coupling. Under one-branch dominance together with a local Markov closure, the dominant branch reduces conditionally to a KPZ-type equation. We also formulate a dictionary from microscopic initial data to the canonical curved, flat, and stationary KPZ benchmarks. Our results do not establish KPZ universality for self-gravitating bosonic dark matter, but they identify the proper comparison field and the controlled regime in which an exact fixed-point test can be posed.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨波状暗物质的一维Gross-Pitaevskii-Poisson模型中，何种粗粒化变量可与KPZ固定点进行有意义的比较，发现相关场不是原始微观相位而是基于声学分支的粗粒化相位。
AI.motivation: 波状暗物质由高占据数的自引力玻色场描述，其振幅和相位都是动力学变量。研究者希望理解在这种微观设置下，哪个粗粒化变量能够与1+1维KPZ固定点进行有意义的比较。
AI.method: 使用一维Gross-Pitaevskii-Poisson玩具模型，分析在Jeans尺度以上和微观截断以下的窗口内，自引力作为局部声动力学的弱变形。通过精确线性模式和弱非线性投影，推导出非零的同手性Burgers自耦合，并在单分支主导和局部马尔可夫闭合条件下，将主导分支简化为KPZ型方程。
AI.result: 研究发现相关场不是原始微观相位，而是基于声学分支的分辨分支粗粒化相位。在特定窗口内，自引力表现为局部声动力学的弱变形，精确线性模式具有局部声形式，弱非线性投影产生非零同手性Burgers自耦合。在单分支主导和局部马尔可夫闭合条件下，主导分支可简化为KPZ型方程。
AI.conclusion: 该研究未确立自引力玻色暗物质的KPZ普适性，但确定了适当的比较场和可控机制，在此机制下可以提出精确的固定点测试。建立了从微观初始数据到规范弯曲、平坦和稳态KPZ基准的对应关系。

title: Competing interlayer charge order and quantum monopole reorganisation in bilayer kagome spin ice via quantum annealing
summary: Magnetic monopoles in frustrated magnets are paradigmatic fractionalised quasiparticles, yet no experimental platform simultaneously tunes their confinement and preserves ice-rule physics. Here we exploit the native bilayer architecture of a D-Wave Advantage2 quantum annealer to realise the first programmable two-plane kagome spin ice, spanning $1{,}536$ logical spins across a $4\times13\times14$ grid of system size, interlayer coupling, and quantum drive. We find that interlayer exchange drives a sharp transition from ferroelectric to antiferroelectric staggered charge order, an Ice-II phase with no classical or single-layer analogue, with a critical onset at $(J_{\perp}/J_1)^{*} \approx 0.044$ that is stable across five decades of annealing time. Restricting the charge structure factor to ice-rule plaquettes reveals an order-of-magnitude enhancement over conventional all-plaquette estimators, demonstrating that quantum-selected charge order is invisible to defect-diluted probes and establishing a methodological standard for future quantum spin ice experiments. The quantum renormalisation of the monopole chemical potential sets a concrete engineering target for the transmon circuit-QED kagome ice required to enter the monopole deconfinement regime. Three falsifiable predictions follow for existing Ni$_{81}$Fe$_{19}$ nanowire bilayer architectures: a critical interlayer separation, an elevated monopole activation temperature, and an order-of-magnitude enhancement of the Ice-II signal in published X-ray datasets, all testable without new fabrication.

AI.tldr: 利用D-Wave量子退火机实现首个可编程双层kagome自旋冰，发现层间耦合驱动从铁电到反铁电的相变，建立了量子自旋冰实验的新方法标准。
AI.motivation: 受挫磁体中的磁单极子是典型的分数化准粒子，但现有实验平台无法同时调控其禁闭并保持冰规则物理。需要建立可编程的双层kagome自旋冰系统来研究这些现象。
AI.method: 利用D-Wave Advantage2量子退火机的原生双层架构，实现可编程双层kagome自旋冰，包含1536个逻辑自旋，系统尺寸为4×13×14网格，调控层间耦合和量子驱动。
AI.result: 层间交换驱动从铁电到反铁电交错电荷序的尖锐相变，发现临界点(J⊥/J1)*≈0.044，在五个数量级的退火时间内保持稳定。冰规则plaquette的电荷结构因子比传统全plaquette估计器增强一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 量子选择的电荷序对缺陷稀释探针不可见，为未来量子自旋冰实验建立了方法标准。磁单极子化学势的量子重整化为进入单极子去禁闭区设定了具体工程目标，并提出了三个可验证的预测。

title: Designing dislocation-driven polar vortex networks in twisted perovskites
summary: Twisting two atomic layers produces a geometric moire pattern, but bonding-induced interfacial reconstruction fundamentally transforms this into an ordered dislocation network - a distinction obscured in weakly-bonded van der Waals systems. Although in-plane topological vortex nanostructures arising from twisting-induced lateral strain modulation have been linked to periodic moire patterns in freestanding perovskite layers and 2D bilayers, their coupling to the interfacial dislocation network in twisted layers remains unresolved. Here we demonstrate that twisting freestanding SrTiO3 layers undergo interfacial reconstruction into a network of screw dislocations, accompanied by the emergence of in-plane topological vortices. Unlike in previous reports, these vortices are associated with the periodicity of the dislocation network rather than with geometric moire patterns. Four-dimensional scanning transmission electron microscopy (4D-STEM) reveals long-range ordered vortex-antivortex arrays with nearly continuous polarisation rotation. A machine-learning interatomic potential, trained on first-principles calculations, together with phase-field modelling, confirms that competing strains within the dislocation network stabilize polar vortex-antivortex pairs and drive the emergence of an electronic superlattice with a well-defined periodicity. Our results establish twist-controlled dislocation networks as a new and versatile route to designing local polar and electronic structures in oxide materials.

AI.tldr: 扭曲SrTiO3层产生螺旋位错网络，形成与位错周期相关的拓扑涡旋-反涡旋阵列，而非几何莫尔图案
AI.motivation: 研究扭曲层中界面位错网络与拓扑涡旋结构的耦合关系，揭示不同于弱键合范德华系统的重构机制
AI.method: 使用4D-STEM表征拓扑涡旋阵列，结合基于第一性原理计算的机器学习原子间势和相场建模分析
AI.result: 发现扭曲SrTiO3层重构为螺旋位错网络，产生长程有序的涡旋-反涡旋阵列，位错网络内的竞争应变稳定了极化涡旋对并驱动电子超晶格形成
AI.conclusion: 扭曲控制的位错网络为设计氧化物材料中的局域极化和电子结构提供了新途径

title: Learning Interatomic Force Coefficients from X-ray Thermal Diffuse Scattering Data
summary: We present a fully automated framework for extracting interatomic force constants (IFCs) directly from X-ray thermal diffuse scattering (TDS) data. By formulating scattering intensity as a differentiable function of a symmetry-reduced IFC parameterization, we enable gradient-based optimization via direct, Cholesky-based sampling of correlated atomic displacements at thermal equilibrium. This approach bypasses the computational bottleneck of repeated Hessian matrix diagonalizations, significantly accelerating the inversion process. Benchmark tests demonstrate that the framework accurately recovers ground-truth IFCs and phonon dispersion relations, providing a robust, high-throughput pathway for studying lattice dynamics across diverse crystalline materials. This method bridges the gap between experimental observations and computational modeling, enabling the direct integration of TDS data into the refinement of high-fidelity inter-atomic potentials.

AI.tldr: 提出从X射线热漫散射数据自动提取原子间力常数的全自动框架，通过可微分参数化和Cholesky采样实现高效梯度优化。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需要重复计算Hessian矩阵对角化，计算成本高，限制了从实验数据中提取原子间力常数的效率。需要建立实验观测与计算模型之间的直接桥梁。
AI.method: 将散射强度表示为对称约化原子间力常数参数化的可微分函数，通过Cholesky采样相关原子位移实现梯度优化，避免了Hessian矩阵重复对角化。
AI.result: 基准测试表明该框架能准确恢复真实原子间力常数和声子色散关系，为研究多种晶体材料的晶格动力学提供了稳健的高通量途径。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了实验观测与计算建模之间的空白，使热漫散射数据能够直接用于高保真原子间势的优化，显著加速了反演过程。

title: Ferromagnetic resonance modulation in topological materials with bulk--boundary coexistence
summary: We extend ferromagnetic resonance (FMR) modulation theory to describe systems in which bulk and boundary states of topological materials coexist, with both appearing at the same energy. As an application of the formulation, we investigate the enhancement of the Gilbert damping constant on the $(110)$ surface of a $d$-wave superconductor where nodal quasiparticles coexist with edge states, which are one-dimensional boundary states, known as surface zero-energy Andreev bound states. We find two characteristic features: a pronounced edge-to-edge excitation peak near zero energy, and an additional edge-to-bulk excitation peak at the superconducting gap energy. We also observe power-law decay at low temperatures and exponential decay at intermediate temperatures in the low-energy regime. These features demonstrate the comparable contributions of the bulk and boundary states to the FMR response. Our theory provides a broadly applicable framework for the analysis of topological materials.

AI.tldr: 将铁磁共振调制理论扩展到体态与边界态共存拓扑材料系统，应用于d波超导体(110)表面，发现吉尔伯特阻尼增强及特征激发峰
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑材料中体态与边界态共存系统对铁磁共振响应的影响，特别是d波超导体表面零能安德列夫束缚态与体态共存情况
AI.method: 扩展铁磁共振调制理论，建立描述体态与边界态共存系统的理论框架，应用于d波超导体(110)表面，分析表面零能安德列夫束缚态与体态共存情况
AI.result: 发现两个特征激发峰：零能附近的边-边激发峰和超导能隙处的边-体激发峰；观察到低温幂律衰减和中等温度指数衰减；证明体态与边界态对FMR响应的可比贡献
AI.conclusion: 理论为拓扑材料分析提供广泛适用框架，体态与边界态共存系统表现出独特FMR响应特征，吉尔伯特阻尼增强表明拓扑材料在自旋电子学中应用潜力

title: Scaling of Long-Range Loop-Erased Random Walks
summary: We study the scaling properties of long-range loop-erased random walks (LR-LERW), where the underlying random walker performs Lévy-flight-like jumps with a power-law step-length distribution $P(\mathbf{r})\sim |\mathbf{r}|^{-(d+σ)}$. Using extensive Monte Carlo simulations, we measure the scaling relation $N \sim R^{d_N}$ between the loop-erased step number $N$ and the spatial extent $R$, and determine the geometric exponent $d_N$ for various values of $σ$ in spatial dimensions $d = 1, 2,$ and $3$, as well as at the marginal point $σ= 2$ in $d=4$ and $5$. We observe a continuous crossover from long-range (LR) to short-range (SR) behavior as $σ$ increases. Below the upper critical dimension $d<d_c=4$, for $σ< d/2$, loop erasure is asymptotically irrelevant and $d_N=σ$, consistent with Lévy-flight scaling. For $d/2 < σ< 2$, loop erasure becomes relevant and $d_N$ varies continuously toward the SR-LERW value. At the marginal points with $σ=d/2$ or $σ=2$, clear logarithmic corrections are observed. At and above the upper critical dimension, $d \geq 4$, the scaling at $σ=2$ is found to be $N \sim R^2/\ln R$, consistent with that of the corresponding Lévy flight. Our results provide a systematic numerical determination of $d_N(σ)$ for the LR-LERW across dimensions, and are consistent with $σ_* = 2$ as the boundary between LR and SR critical behaviors recently established in a broad variety of statistical models.

AI.tldr: 研究长程环擦除随机游走(LR-LERW)的标度性质，通过蒙特卡洛模拟确定几何指数d_N随参数σ的变化，观察到从长程到短程行为的连续交叉。
AI.motivation: 研究具有幂律步长分布的长程环擦除随机游走的标度行为，探索环擦除过程在不同参数空间中的相关性与无关性，理解长程与短程临界行为的边界。
AI.method: 使用广泛的蒙特卡洛模拟，测量环擦除步数N与空间范围R之间的标度关系N∼R^{d_N}，确定在不同空间维度(d=1,2,3,4,5)和不同σ值下的几何指数d_N。
AI.result: 发现d_N随σ连续变化：当σ<d/2时，环擦除无关，d_N=σ；当d/2<σ<2时，环擦除相关，d_N向短程值连续变化；在σ=d/2或σ=2的边际点观察到对数修正；在d≥4且σ=2时，N∼R^2/lnR。
AI.conclusion: 系统地数值确定了LR-LERW在不同维度下的d_N(σ)，结果支持σ_*=2作为长程与短程临界行为的分界，与多种统计模型中的近期发现一致。

title: Quantum-Coherent Regime of Programmable Dipolar Spin Ice
summary: Frustrated spin-ice systems support emergent gauge fields and fractionalized quasiparticles that act as magnetic monopoles. Although artificial platforms have enabled their direct visualization, access to their quantum-coherent dynamics has remained limited. Here we realize a programmable dipolar square spin-ice model using a superconducting-qubit quantum annealer, providing access to a previously unexplored quantum-coherent regime of artificial spin ice. By implementing a direct one-to-one mapping between lattice spins and physical qubits, together with engineered extended couplings, we realize effective dipolar interactions on frustrated lattices comprising more than 400 vertices. Tuning transverse-field fluctuations enables us to probe the real-time dynamics of Dirac-string defects and interacting monopole plasmas. We observe super-diffusive monopole transport, with scaling exponents intermediate between classical diffusion and ballistic motion, indicating dynamics beyond classical stochastic relaxation and consistent with coherent propagation within an emergent gauge manifold. These results establish programmable quantum spin ice as a scalable platform for investigating fractionalized excitations and emergent gauge dynamics in engineered quantum matter.

AI.tldr: 利用超导量子退火器实现可编程偶极方晶格自旋冰模型，首次进入人工自旋冰的量子相干区域，观测到狄拉克弦缺陷和单极子等离子体的实时动力学。
AI.motivation: 受挫自旋冰系统支持涌现规范场和分数化准粒子（磁单极子），但人工平台虽然能直接可视化这些现象，却难以访问其量子相干动力学。
AI.method: 使用超导量子退火器实现可编程偶极方晶格自旋冰模型，通过晶格自旋与物理量子比特的一对一映射，结合工程化扩展耦合，在超过400个顶点的受挫晶格上实现有效偶极相互作用。
AI.result: 观察到狄拉克弦缺陷和相互作用的单极子等离子体的实时动力学，发现超扩散的单极子输运，其标度指数介于经典扩散和弹道运动之间，表明动力学超越了经典随机弛豫，与涌现规范流形中的相干传播一致。
AI.conclusion: 可编程量子自旋冰成为研究工程量子物质中分数化激发和涌现规范动力学的可扩展平台。

title: Low-scaling \textit{GW} calculation of quasi-particle energies within numerical atomic orbital framework
summary: The many-body perturbation theory within the $GW$ approximation is a widely used method for describing the electronic band structures in real materials. Its application to large-scale systems is, however, impeded by its high computational cost. The rate-limiting steps in a typical $GW$ implementation are the evaluation of the polarization function under the random phase approximation (RPA) and the evaluation of the $GW$ self-energy, both of which have a canonical $O(N^4)$ scaling with $N$ being the system size. The conventional space-time algorithm within the plane-wave basis sets reduces the scaling from $O(N^4)$ to $O(N^3)$, albeit with a large prefactor and increased memory cost. Here, we present a space-time algorithm within the numerical atomic orbital (NAO) basis-set framework, for which the evaluation of the polarization function and self-energy is formally reduced to $O(N^2)$ or better with respect to system size. This is achieved by computing these quantities in real space, where low-scaling algorithms can be formulated by leveraging the localized resolution of identity (LRI) technique. The resulting NAO-based, LRI-enhanced space-time $GW$ algorithm has been implemented in the LibRPA library interfaced with the FHI-aims code package. Benchmark calculations for crystalline solids show that the low-scaling implementation yields quasi-particle energies in close agreement with the conventional $O(N^4)$ k-space formalism previously implemented in FHI-aims. For the systems studied here, the observed overall scaling is substantially reduced relative to the canonical approach, and the low-scaling implementation becomes advantageous already for systems containing fewer than 100 atoms.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数值原子轨道(NAO)基组的空间-时间算法，将GW计算中极化函数和自能的计算复杂度从O(N⁴)降低到O(N²)或更好，适用于大规模系统计算。
AI.motivation: GW近似下的多体微扰理论是描述真实材料电子能带结构的常用方法，但应用于大规模系统时受到高计算成本的限制。传统平面波基组中的空间-时间算法将复杂度从O(N⁴)降低到O(N³)，但仍有较大的预因子和内存开销。
AI.method: 在数值原子轨道(NAO)基组框架内开发空间-时间算法，通过在实空间中计算极化函数和自能，利用局域分辨率恒等(LRI)技术实现低标度算法，将计算复杂度降低到O(N²)或更好。
AI.result: 在LibRPA库中实现并与FHI-aims代码包接口。对晶体固体的基准计算表明，低标度实现得到的准粒子能量与FHI-aims中先前实现的传统O(N⁴) k空间形式非常一致。对于研究的系统，整体标度相对于规范方法显著降低，对于包含少于100个原子的系统，低标度实现已经具有优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于NAO的LRI增强空间-时间GW算法成功降低了GW计算的计算复杂度，使其能够更高效地应用于大规模系统，同时保持与传统方法相当的准确性。

title: Scalability of the asynchronous discontinuous Galerkin method for compressible flow simulations
summary: The scalability of time-dependent partial differential equation (PDE) solvers based on the discontinuous Galerkin (DG) method is increasingly limited by data communication and synchronization requirements across processing elements (PEs) at extreme scales. To address these challenges, asynchronous computing approaches that relax communication and synchronization at a mathematical level have been proposed. In particular, the asynchronous discontinuous Galerkin (ADG) method with asynchrony-tolerant (AT) fluxes has recently been shown to recover high-order accuracy under relaxed communication, supported by detailed analyses of its accuracy and stability. However, the scalability of this approach in modern large-scale parallel DG solvers has not yet been systematically investigated. In this paper, we address this gap by implementing the ADG method coupled with AT fluxes in the open-source finite element library deal.II. We employ a communication-avoiding algorithm (CAA) that reduces the frequency of inter-process communication while accommodating controlled delays in ghost value exchanges. We first demonstrate that applying standard numerical fluxes in this asynchronous setting degrades the solution to first-order accuracy, irrespective of the polynomial degree. By incorporating AT fluxes that utilize data from multiple previous time levels, we successfully recover the formal high-order accuracy of the DG discretization. The accuracy of the proposed method is rigorously verified using benchmark problems for the compressible Euler equations. Furthermore, we evaluate the performance of the method through extensive strong-scaling studies for both two- and three-dimensional test cases. Our results indicate that CAA substantially suppresses synchronization overheads, yielding speedups of up to 1.9x in two dimensions and 1.6x in three dimensions compared to a baseline synchronous DG solver.

AI.tldr: 异步间断伽辽金方法结合异步容忍通量，在放松通信同步要求下恢复高阶精度，通过通信避免算法在并行计算中获得显著加速
AI.motivation: 传统间断伽辽金方法在极端规模并行计算中面临通信和同步瓶颈，需要异步计算方法来提升可扩展性
AI.method: 在deal.II库中实现异步间断伽辽金方法，结合异步容忍通量（使用多个历史时间层数据）和通信避免算法，减少进程间通信频率
AI.result: 异步容忍通量成功恢复DG离散化的高阶精度，通信避免算法显著抑制同步开销，在2D和3D测试中分别获得1.9倍和1.6倍的加速
AI.conclusion: 异步间断伽辽金方法结合异步容忍通量是解决大规模并行DG求解器通信瓶颈的有效方案，能够在不损失精度的情况下显著提升计算性能

title: Dynamical diffraction formalism for imaging time-dependent diffuse scattering from coherent phonons with Dark-Field X-ray Microscopy
summary: Coherent acoustic phonons, whose damping sets the upper bound of quality factors in acoustic resonators, play a critical role in advanced telecommunication and quantum information technologies. Yet, probing their decay in the GHz regime remains challenging using conventional surface-based techniques. Dark-field X-ray microscopy (DFXM) offers a solution by enabling through-depth, non-destructive and full-field imaging of strain fields and dislocations inside bulk materials with high spatial and angular resolution. We previously used kinematic diffraction theory to describe DFXM signals based on how the Bragg peak shifts due to the strain wave, allowing us to reconstruct the frequency spectrum of coherent phonons as a function of depth through the sample. The approach of tracking the Bragg peak shifts to study phonon dynamics, however, places an upper-bound to the highest phonon frequency that can be studied, determined by the spatial resolution of the measurement. In this work, we discuss how coherent phonon dynamics can be studied with DFXM from time-dependent intensity oscillation sidebands. This approach simultaneously allows studying coherent phonon dynamics in real and reciprocal space, overcoming frequency resolution limits imposed by the real-space resolution of Bragg-peak tracking. Using Takagi-Taupin dynamical diffraction formalism, we establish the spatial and reciprocal space resolution achievable for studying the coherent phonon dynamics and evaluate conditions for observing long-lived intensity oscillations. We close by proposing experimental strategies to optimize excitation bandwidths and reciprocal-space selectivity. The formalism in the paper enables the design of DFXM experiments for quantitative, frequency-resolved measurements of acoustic phonon decay and phonon-defect interactions in bulk crystalline materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用暗场X射线显微镜（DFXM）通过时间依赖的强度振荡边带研究相干声学声子动力学，克服了传统布拉格峰位移方法的频率分辨率限制。
AI.motivation: 相干声学声子在先进通信和量子信息技术中至关重要，但其在GHz频段的衰减测量面临挑战。传统表面探测技术和基于布拉格峰位移的DFXM方法存在频率分辨率限制，需要新的方法来研究声子动力学。
AI.method: 采用Takagi-Taupin动力学衍射理论，通过分析时间依赖的强度振荡边带来研究相干声子动力学。该方法允许在实空间和倒易空间同时研究声子行为，克服了布拉格峰跟踪方法的频率分辨率限制。
AI.result: 建立了研究相干声子动力学的空间和倒易空间分辨率框架，评估了观测长寿命强度振荡的条件，并提出了优化激发带宽和倒易空间选择性的实验策略。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为设计DFXM实验提供了基础，能够实现体晶材料中声学声子衰减和声子-缺陷相互作用的定量、频率分辨测量，克服了传统方法的频率分辨率限制。

title: Trinity of Varentropy: Finiteness, Fluctuations, and Stability in Power-Law Statistics
summary: Power-law distributions are widely observed in complex systems, yet establishing their thermodynamic consistency remains a theoretical challenge. In this paper, we present a thermodynamic framework for power-law statistics based on the \textit{renormalized entropy} $s_{2-q}$. Derived from the asymptotic scaling of the combinatorial $q$-factorial, this quantity yields a stable thermodynamic limit, remaining finite ($O(N^0)$) for systems with strong correlations. Furthermore, we clarify the physical origin of the nonlinearity parameter $q$ through the concept of \textit{Varentropy} (Variance of Entropy). By unifying the macroscopic variational principle with the microscopic Superstatistics framework, we derive the relation $|q-1| \simeq 1/C$, where $C$ is the heat capacity of the reservoir. This result suggests that power-law statistics provides a thermodynamic description of finite systems, where the finite heat capacity of the heat bath necessitates a generalization beyond the standard Boltzmann-Gibbs limit ($C \to \infty$).

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于重整化熵s_{2-q}的热力学框架，用于描述幂律分布，并通过变熵概念解释了非线性参数q的物理起源，建立了q与热库热容量的关系。
AI.motivation: 幂律分布在复杂系统中广泛存在，但建立其热力学一致性仍然是一个理论挑战。需要为幂律统计提供一个热力学框架，并解释非线性参数q的物理意义。
AI.method: 基于组合q阶乘的渐近标度推导重整化熵s_{2-q}，通过变熵概念解释参数q的物理起源，并将宏观变分原理与微观超统计框架统一，推导出q与热库热容量C的关系。
AI.result: 建立了幂律统计的热力学框架，重整化熵s_{2-q}在强相关系统中保持有限稳定。推导出关系|q-1| ≃ 1/C，表明q由热库的有限热容量决定，幂律统计为有限系统提供了热力学描述。
AI.conclusion: 幂律统计为有限热容量的系统提供了超越标准玻尔兹曼-吉布斯极限的热力学描述，其中非线性参数q由热库的有限热容量决定，当C→∞时回归到标准统计力学。

title: Tilted and Twisted Magnetic Moments in the Kitaev Magnet $α$-RuCl$_3$
comment: Accepted for publication in Chinese Physics Letters; 8 pages, 4 figures
summary: The layered honeycomb magnet $α$-RuCl$_3$ has attracted intense scrutiny as a prime candidate for realizing the Kitaev quantum spin liquid, yet a consensus on its microscopic Hamiltonian remains elusive due to the material's extreme sensitivity to structural details. Here, we report a comprehensive reexamination of the low-temperature crystallographic and magnetic structures of high-quality $α$-RuCl$_3$ single crystals using unpolarized and polarized neutron diffraction. We confirm a sharp, first-order structural phase transition to the rhombohedral $R\bar{3}$ space group with a pronounced thermal hysteresis. Crucially, using both spherical and longitudinal neutron polarization analysis, we determine the 3D orientation of the ordered magnetic moment without the ambiguity typically arising from domain distributions. We find that the Ru$^{3+}$ magnetic moments in the zigzag phase are tilted by $15.7^\circ$ out of the hexagonal plane and, remarkably, exhibit an additional in-plane twist of $-13.8^\circ$. This "tilted and twisted" geometry differentiates the ground state from the previously reported models based on unpolarized neutron diffraction or resonant elastic X-ray scattering (REXS) analysis.

AI.tldr: 通过极化中子衍射确认α-RuCl₃的磁结构为"倾斜且扭曲"的几何构型，区别于先前模型
AI.motivation: α-RuCl₃作为Kitaev量子自旋液体的候选材料，其微观哈密顿量仍存在争议，主要原因是材料对结构细节极为敏感
AI.method: 使用非极化和极化中子衍射（包括球面和纵向极化分析）重新检查高质量α-RuCl₃单晶的低温晶体结构和磁结构
AI.result: 确认了向菱面体R3空间群的一级结构相变，并确定了Ru³⁺磁矩在zigzag相中偏离六角平面15.7°，同时存在-13.8°的面内扭曲
AI.conclusion: 这种"倾斜且扭曲"的几何构型与先前基于非极化中子衍射或REXS分析的模型不同，为理解α-RuCl₃的微观哈密顿量提供了关键信息

title: Current-tunable room temperature ferromagnetism and current-driven phase transitions
summary: It is generally assumed that the application of a charge-current in ferromagnetic metals suppresses their ferromagnetic order through trivial Joule heating. Here, we demonstrate that a charge current can instead enhance magnetic ordering. Using a WTe2/Fe3Ge2Te (FGT) stack as a model system, we show that a charge current flowing in WTe2 controls the ferromagnetic properties and magnetic phase transition of the adjacent FGT via a current-induced effective magnetic-field arising from orbital magnetization. Remarkably, the charge current drives a substantial enhancement of the Curie temperature, boosting it well above room temperature. Furthermore, we show that the charge-current enables controlled tuning of the phase transitions in FGT, which confirms the scaling behaviour of a ferromagnet-paramagnet phase transition. This work provides a pathway for integrating two-dimensional ferromagnets into spintronic functionalities at technologically relevant temperatures and for exploring novel current-driven phenomena in ferromagnetic systems.

AI.tldr: 电荷电流通过轨道磁化产生的有效磁场增强二维铁磁体FGT的居里温度，使其超过室温，实现电流驱动的磁性调控
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为电荷电流通过焦耳热抑制铁磁有序，但本文探索电流能否增强磁性有序，为二维铁磁体在室温下集成到自旋电子器件提供新途径
AI.method: 使用WTe2/Fe3Ge2Te (FGT)堆叠作为模型系统，通过WTe2中的电荷电流产生轨道磁化诱导的有效磁场，调控相邻FGT的铁磁性质和相变
AI.result: 电荷电流显著增强居里温度，使其超过室温；实现FGT相变的可控调谐，验证了铁磁-顺磁相变的标度行为
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为二维铁磁体在技术相关温度下集成到自旋电子功能提供了途径，并为探索铁磁系统中新的电流驱动现象开辟了道路

title: Neural operator accelerated atomistic to continuum concurrent multiscale simulations of viscoelasticity
summary: We present a neural-operator-accelerated concurrent multiscale framework that couples atomistic simulations with continuum finite-element analysis for history-dependent materials, thereby making atomistic-continuum multiscale simulations of viscoelastic materials tractable. The approach replaces direct molecular dynamics (MD) evaluation of the constitutive response with a Recurrent Neural Operator (RNO) surrogate trained on atomistic simulations. The surrogate learns the strain-history-to-stress operator from molecular dynamics simulations and provides a discretization-independent approximation of the atomistic constitutive mapping, enabling efficient evaluation of stresses and latent internal variables at each quadrature point. The framework is implemented within an explicit finite-element solver, where the constitutive update reduces to inexpensive operator evaluations rather than repeated MD solves. Memory effects are represented through learned internal states, and transfer learning across temperature enables the surrogate to capture thermally dependent viscoelastic behavior. The method is assessed using polyurea through cyclic loading, Taylor impact, and plate impact simulations and compared with an experimentally calibrated viscoelastic polyurea model and a Johnson-Cook model. The neural-operator surrogate reproduces correct viscoelastic response while enabling atomistically informed dynamic simulations at scales that are not tractable with direct MD-FEM coupling.

AI.tldr: 提出基于神经算子的并发多尺度框架，通过循环神经算子替代分子动力学计算，实现粘弹性材料原子-连续体多尺度模拟的可行性
AI.motivation: 传统原子-连续体多尺度模拟中，分子动力学计算成本过高，难以处理历史依赖材料（如粘弹性材料）的大规模动态模拟
AI.method: 使用循环神经算子作为分子动力学的替代模型，学习应变历史到应力的映射关系；在显式有限元求解器中实现，通过算子评估而非重复MD计算；利用迁移学习捕捉温度依赖的粘弹性行为
AI.result: 方法在聚脲材料的循环加载、泰勒冲击和板冲击模拟中表现良好，能够重现正确的粘弹性响应，实现原子尺度信息的大规模动态模拟
AI.conclusion: 神经算子加速的多尺度框架使原子-连续体粘弹性材料模拟变得可行，相比直接MD-FEM耦合能够处理更大尺度的动态模拟

title: Emergent Magnetic Monopole in Artificial Polariton Spin Ice
summary: Artificial spin ice provides a versatile setting for emergent gauge fields and magnetic monopole excitations. Here we propose a driven-dissipative polariton realization of artificial spin ice, in which the circular polarization of each link mode plays the role of an Ising degree of freedom, while an auxiliary lossy vertex mode dynamically enforces a local ice-rule constraint. Adiabatic elimination of the vertex mode yields an effective spin-ice penalty, favoring the two-in two-out manifold in the steady state. We show that local polarization flips generate monopole-antimonopole defects, and that sequential flips transport these defects across the lattice while defining a Dirac string. In an extended spin-ice geometry, the vertex charges and their dynamics can be directly reconstructed from polarization-resolved real-space imaging. Our results establish polariton lattices as a controllable photonic platform for creating, manipulating, and observing emergent gauge charges in nonequilibrium spin-ice systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于极化激元实现人工自旋冰的非平衡系统，其中偏振态扮演伊辛自由度，通过损耗顶点模式动态实施冰规则约束，实现磁单极子缺陷的生成和操控。
AI.motivation: 人工自旋冰系统为研究规范场和磁单极子激发提供了平台，但传统实现方式在控制和观测方面存在限制。本文旨在建立一个可控的光子平台，用于在非平衡条件下创建、操纵和观察自旋冰系统中的涌现规范电荷。
AI.method: 采用极化激元晶格系统，每个链接模式的圆偏振作为伊辛自由度，引入辅助的损耗顶点模式动态实施局部冰规则约束。通过绝热消除顶点模式得到有效的自旋冰惩罚项，在稳态中实现二进二出的冰规则构型。
AI.result: 局部偏振翻转产生磁单极子-反单极子缺陷，连续翻转可在晶格中传输这些缺陷并定义狄拉克弦。在扩展的自旋冰几何中，顶点电荷及其动力学可通过偏振分辨实空间成像直接重构。
AI.conclusion: 极化激元晶格为在非平衡自旋冰系统中创建、操纵和观察涌现规范电荷提供了一个可控的光子平台，为研究非平衡拓扑激发开辟了新途径。

title: Geometric Foundations of Stochastic and Quantum Dynamics
summary: We develop a geometric formulation of stochastic dynamics in which noise, diffusion, path probabilities, fluctuation theorems, and entropy production arise from the intrinsic geometry of an evolving manifold rather than from externally imposed randomness. Within the theory of moving manifolds, we establish a curvature-noise correspondence: fluctuations are governed by the inverse curvature tensor, while entropy production is controlled by curvature deformation. The invariant continuity law on a moving hypersurface yields a geometric Fokker-Planck equation, and curvature-velocity coupling generates a quadratic Onsager-Machlup functional determining path weights. The resulting entropy functional satisfies a curvature-driven monotonicity law, providing a geometric derivation of the Second Law. In two dimensions, the curvature invariant reduces to Gaussian curvature and encodes topology, so topological transitions produce discrete entropy jumps. When the ambient space carries a Minkowskian signature, the same curvature-kinetic quadratic form that generates dissipative thermal weights produces oscillatory phase weights, and the Laplace-Beltrami operator governing entropy evolution acquires a Schrödinger-type structure. This provides a geometric resolution of the apparent distinction between classical stochastic behaviour and quantum dynamics. These results show that stochastic behaviour, thermodynamic irreversibility, and quantum transition amplitudes are unified within the moving manifold framework. Geometry does not merely accommodate stochasticity; stochastic behaviour arises as a consequence of deterministic geometric evolution. The theory predicts curvature-controlled anisotropic diffusion, entropy jumps at topology-changing events, and a geometric thermal-quantum crossover in which classical stochastic weights and quantum amplitudes are generated by the same curvature-kinetic action.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种随机动力学的几何表述，其中噪声、扩散、路径概率、涨落定理和熵产生都源于演化流形的内在几何，而非外部强加的随机性。
AI.motivation: 传统随机动力学通常将噪声视为外部强加的随机过程。本文旨在从纯粹的几何角度重新理解随机行为，将随机性、热力学不可逆性和量子动力学统一在移动流形框架下。
AI.method: 基于移动流形理论，建立曲率-噪声对应关系：涨落由逆曲率张量控制，熵产生由曲率变形控制。推导几何Fokker-Planck方程，通过曲率-速度耦合生成二次Onsager-Machlup泛函确定路径权重。
AI.result: 建立了曲率控制各向异性扩散、拓扑变化事件中的熵跳跃，以及几何热-量子交叉现象，其中经典随机权重和量子振幅由相同的曲率-动能作用生成。在闵可夫斯基签名下，拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子获得薛定谔型结构。
AI.conclusion: 随机行为、热力学不可逆性和量子跃迁振幅在移动流形框架下得到统一。几何不仅容纳随机性，随机行为实际上是确定性几何演化的结果，为经典随机行为和量子动力学提供了几何解析。

title: Spontaneously formed excitonic density wave with vortex-antivortex lattice in twisted semiconductor bilayers
summary: Exciton condensation, characterized by uniform phase coherence across macroscopic length scales, has enabled the discovery of a variety of excitonic states, greatly enriching our understanding of correlated many-body physics. More exotic quantum phenomena are anticipated when the phase factor develops spatial dependence. However, whether excitonic condensates with spatially modulated phase profiles can emerge spontaneously remains an open question. In this work, we uncover novel forms of excitonic density waves featuring nontrivial phase patterns in twisted semiconductor bilayers. Remarkably, we show that kinetic frustration inherent to these systems stabilizes excitonic condensates arranged into a vortex-antivortex lattice. This represents a class of correlated states previously unknown in two-dimensional semiconductors, wherein the phase degrees of freedom of exciton condensates play a defining role. Such states spontaneously break both time-reversal and inversion symmetries, leading to non-reciprocal exciton transport, an effect we term the excitonic diode effect. Furthermore, we compute and identify characteristic impurity-induced states in these unconventional condensates, providing distinct signatures for their experimental detection.

AI.tldr: 在扭曲半导体双层结构中发现了新型激子密度波，其具有非平凡相位图案，形成涡旋-反涡旋晶格，表现出非互易激子输运的激子二极管效应。
AI.motivation: 激子凝聚体通常具有宏观尺度的均匀相位相干性，但相位因子具有空间依赖性的更奇特量子现象尚未被探索。激子凝聚体能否自发形成具有空间调制相位轮廓的状态仍是一个开放性问题。
AI.method: 研究扭曲半导体双层结构，利用这些系统中固有的动力学阻挫来稳定激子凝聚体，使其排列成涡旋-反涡旋晶格。计算并识别这些非常规凝聚体中的特征杂质诱导态。
AI.result: 发现了具有非平凡相位图案的新型激子密度波，形成了涡旋-反涡旋晶格。这些状态自发破坏了时间反演对称性和反演对称性，导致了非互易激子输运（激子二极管效应）。计算出了这些非常规凝聚体的特征杂质诱导态，为实验检测提供了明确特征。
AI.conclusion: 在扭曲半导体双层结构中发现了以前未知的激子凝聚体类型，其中激子凝聚体的相位自由度起着决定性作用。这些状态代表了二维半导体中一类新的相关态，为探索更奇特的量子现象提供了新平台。

title: Alloying Controlled Tuning of Interfacial Spin Orbit Interaction and Magnetic Damping in Crystalline FeCo Alloys
summary: The discovery of intrinsic spin orbit fields in noncentrosymmetric ferromagnets has attracted considerable interest for both fundamental studies and technological applications. However, once such materials are synthesized, the strength of the spin orbit fields is difficult to tune because it is primarily a bulk property. Here, we demonstrate that the interfacial spin orbit interaction (SOI) in single crystalline FeCo thin films grown on GaAs(001) can be continuously tuned via alloying. Using spin orbit ferromagnetic resonance, we find that the Lande g factor, the Gilbert damping (alpha), and the interfacial spin orbit fields exhibit a common nonmonotonic dependence on Co concentration. A pronounced minimum occurs near x ~ 0.2 where an ultra low damping alpha ~ 0.0015 is achieved. Furthermore, we observe linear scaling between alpha and (g-2)^2, establishing a direct correlation between interfacial SOI and magnetic relaxation. These results identify alloying as an effective knob to engineer interfacial SOI and damping in single crystalline ferromagnet semiconductor heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 通过合金化调控FeCo/GaAs异质结的界面自旋轨道相互作用，实现超低阻尼和自旋轨道场的连续调控
AI.motivation: 非中心对称铁磁体中的本征自旋轨道场难以调控，因为它是体材料性质。需要开发调控界面自旋轨道相互作用的方法，以应用于基础研究和器件应用。
AI.method: 在GaAs(001)衬底上生长单晶FeCo薄膜，通过改变Co浓度进行合金化。使用自旋轨道铁磁共振技术测量朗德g因子、吉尔伯特阻尼(α)和界面自旋轨道场。
AI.result: 朗德g因子、吉尔伯特阻尼和界面自旋轨道场随Co浓度呈现共同的非单调变化，在x~0.2处出现明显最小值，实现超低阻尼α~0.0015。α与(g-2)^2呈线性比例关系。
AI.conclusion: 合金化是调控单晶铁磁体-半导体异质结界面自旋轨道相互作用和阻尼的有效手段，为自旋电子学器件设计提供了新的调控维度。

title: Comparison of Origins of Re-Entrant Supercurrents at High In-Plane Magnetic Fields in Planar InAs-Al Josephson Junctions
summary: Hybrid superconductor-semiconductor systems with large spin-orbit coupling are important platforms for realizing topological or triplet superconductivity. Planar Josephson junctions made using these materials are predicted to enter the topological state by tuning the phase difference between the two superconductors from 0 to $π$. The 0-$π$ transition can be driven by magnetic field through Zeeman splitting of subbands in the semiconductor. It is expected to manifest as a node, or a re-entrance, in the critical current. Here we present re-entrant switching currents from several InAs/Al planar Josephson junctions in high in-plane magnetic fields. We find that re-entrances in some devices conform with expected signatures for topological or 0-$π$ transitions. However, we show that the data can also be explained in terms of mode interference in the junction in the presence of disorder. We also present simulations of supercurrent interference under in-plane fields that can reproduce re-entrances due to corrugated weak link without invoking the Zeeman effect or topology.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了InAs/Al平面约瑟夫森结在高面内磁场下的重入开关电流现象，探讨了这些现象是否可作为拓扑或0-π转变的证据，但也提出了无序导致的模式干涉作为替代解释。
AI.motivation: 研究具有强自旋轨道耦合的混合超导-半导体系统中的平面约瑟夫森结，旨在探索拓扑超导性和三重态超导性。特别关注通过磁场驱动0-π转变的可能性，这种转变被认为是进入拓扑态的关键标志。
AI.method: 实验测量了多个InAs/Al平面约瑟夫森结在高面内磁场下的开关电流特性。通过观察重入现象，并与理论预测的拓扑或0-π转变特征进行比较。同时进行了超电流干涉模拟，考虑无序和弱连接波纹的影响。
AI.result: 观察到了多个器件中的重入开关电流现象。部分器件的重入行为与预期的拓扑或0-π转变特征相符。然而，研究发现这些数据也可以用无序存在下的模式干涉来解释。模拟显示，即使不考虑塞曼效应或拓扑，仅由弱连接的波纹引起的超电流干涉也能产生重入现象。
AI.conclusion: 虽然观察到的重入开关电流现象与拓扑或0-π转变的预期特征有相似之处，但研究强调了需要考虑无序和模式干涉等替代解释的重要性。这表明在识别拓扑超导特征时需要更加谨慎，不能仅凭重入现象就断定拓扑转变的发生。

title: Solving the inverse problem of X-ray absorption spectroscopy via physics-informed deep learning
summary: Resolving transient atomic configurations in non-crystalline or dynamic environments remains a fundamental bottleneck in the physical sciences. While X-ray absorption spectroscopy (XAS) is a premier probe of local structure, inverting spectra into structural descriptors is a notoriously ill-posed problem due to inherent many-to-one mapping. Here, we present the Spectral Pattern Translator (SPT), a physics-informed deep learning framework that establishes a robust bridge between large-scale theoretical datasets and experimental reality. Our strategy exploits the Fourier duality between spectral energy oscillations and spatial scattering paths to overcome the "simulation-to-experiment" gap. By decomposing spectra into frequency domains, SPT effectively isolates robust structural coordination signals from the destabilizing noise inherent in experimental data. Trained on a massive library of diverse atomic environments, this approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy in resolving continuous phase transitions in battery cathodes and deciphering local order in amorphous materials. With millisecond-scale latency, SPT removes the primary computational barrier to autonomous materials discovery, establishing a robust, noise-resilient engine for closed-loop robotic chemistry.

AI.tldr: SPT是一个物理信息深度学习框架，通过傅里叶变换将X射线吸收光谱分解为频率域，有效分离结构信号与实验噪声，实现毫秒级原子结构解析。
AI.motivation: 解决非晶态或动态环境中瞬态原子构型解析的基本瓶颈，克服X射线吸收光谱反演中固有的多对一映射问题。
AI.method: 利用光谱能量振荡与空间散射路径之间的傅里叶对偶性，将光谱分解为频率域，从大规模理论数据集中学习，隔离结构配位信号与实验噪声。
AI.result: 在电池阴极连续相变解析和非晶材料局部有序性识别方面达到最先进精度，实现毫秒级延迟，为自主材料发现扫除计算障碍。
AI.conclusion: SPT建立了理论数据与实验现实之间的稳健桥梁，创建了噪声鲁棒的闭环机器人化学引擎，推动了材料科学的发展。

title: Geometry-controlled competition between axis centering and detwinning in fivefold-twinned gold nanoparticles
summary: Fivefold-twinned metal nanoparticles host a central wedge disclination that strongly influences their mechanical and catalytic properties. Yet the atomistic mechanisms governing the stability, migration, and annihilation of this topological defect remain incompletely understood. Here we present a systematic molecular dynamics study of gold Marks decahedra in which the fivefold axis is artificially brought close to the surface by controlled geometric modifications. By generating concave and convex morphologies with varying axis depth, we uncover a geometry-controlled competition between axis centering and detwinning. Concave geometries promote surface diffusion that restores fivefold symmetry, either by recentering the original disclination or by nucleating a new subsurface axis through collective atomic rearrangements. In contrast, convex structures with a shallow axis undergo rapid detwinning within the first nanoseconds via surface glide, leading to single-twin or fully FCC configurations. Remarkably, positioning the axis just two atomic layers beneath the surface suppresses detwinning and restores stability. Our results demonstrate that surface curvature and defect depth critically regulate disclination mobility and twin stability, providing a mechanistic framework to understand the structural evolution of multi-twinned nanoparticles and to guide the controlled design of defect-engineered nanomaterials.

AI.tldr: 通过分子动力学模拟研究金Marks十面体中五重轴缺陷的稳定性机制，发现表面曲率和缺陷深度控制着向错迁移和孪晶稳定性。
AI.motivation: 五重孪晶金属纳米粒子中的中心楔形向错对其力学和催化性质有重要影响，但控制这种拓扑缺陷稳定性、迁移和湮灭的原子机制尚未完全理解。
AI.method: 采用系统分子动力学研究金Marks十面体，通过控制几何修饰人为将五重轴靠近表面，生成具有不同轴深度的凹凸形态，研究几何控制下的轴心化与去孪晶竞争。
AI.result: 凹几何促进表面扩散恢复五重对称性，凸结构浅轴通过表面滑移快速去孪晶，而将轴置于表面下仅两个原子层可抑制去孪晶并恢复稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 表面曲率和缺陷深度是调控向错迁移和孪晶稳定性的关键因素，为理解多孪晶纳米粒子结构演化提供了机制框架，有助于指导缺陷工程纳米材料的设计。

title: Ergotropic rearrangement of phase space density
summary: The explicit expression of ergotropy (a.k.a. available energy) of a classical system is known for the case when the system phase space density is continuous and with no plateaus. Here we provide the general expression of ergotropy that applies without those limitations. It easily follows upon casting the ergotropy problem as a function rearrangement problem. This leads to the notion of "ergotropic rearangement" which generalises that of "symmetric decreasing rearrangement" (an advanced topic of measure theory). We apply it to investigate the fate of classical ergotropy in the thermodynamic limit, and find that any density of the form $ρ=f(H_0)$ is asymptotically passive, where $H_0$ is the system Hamiltonian and $f$ a generic function.

AI.tldr: 本文提供了经典系统ergotropy（可用能量）的通用表达式，适用于相空间密度不连续或有平台的情况，通过将ergotropy问题转化为函数重排问题来解决。
AI.motivation: 现有ergotropy表达式仅适用于相空间密度连续且无平台的情况，需要更通用的表达式来覆盖所有情况。
AI.method: 将ergotropy问题转化为函数重排问题，引入"ergotropic rearrangement"概念，推广了测度论中的"symmetric decreasing rearrangement"。
AI.result: 得到了适用于所有情况的经典ergotropy通用表达式，并发现热力学极限下任何形式为ρ=f(H₀)的密度都是渐进被动的。
AI.conclusion: 通过函数重排方法成功解决了经典ergotropy的通用表达式问题，并在热力学极限下揭示了密度函数与系统哈密顿量关系的重要性质。

title: Tomonaga-Luttinger liquid and charge-density wave in a quasi-one-dimensional material
summary: In one-dimensional (1D) electron systems, the Fermi liquid state breaks down due either to electron interactions, which results in a Tomonaga-Luttinger liquid (TLL) state, or to Peierls instability, which leads to an insulating charge-density-wave (CDW) phase. In general, these two phenomena are mutually exclusive, and their coexistence remains elusive in real materials. Here, we report the discovery of a new quasi-1D material, Cs$_{1-δ}$Cr$_3$S$_3$, which unexpectedly exhibits coexistence of the antithetical CDW and TLL states. The CDW state is evidenced by the intra-unit-cell dimerization, and the opening of an optical band gap of $\sim$250 meV. Meanwhile, TLL behaviour is unambiguously demonstrated by the measurements of electrical transport and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, which reveal a power-law scaling with temperature, bias voltage and electron energy. Band structure calculations reveal isolated, linearly dispersive, 1D bands around the Fermi level. For the dimerized CDW phase, the 1D Fermi-surface sheets located at the boundary of the Brillouin zone are gapped from intra-unit-cell bond symmetry breaking. Experimentally, subtle Cs vacancies shift the Fermi level into the linearly dispersive valence band, enabling the observation of TLL behaviour without interrupting the CDW order. This work establishes Cs$_{1-δ}$Cr$_3$S$_3$ as a rare material platform in which the antagonistic Fermi-liquid instabilities coexist and intertwine, opening new avenues for studying emergent quantum phenomena in 1D systems.

AI.tldr: 在准一维材料Cs₁₋δCr₃S₃中首次发现电荷密度波(CDW)和Tomonaga-Luttinger液体(TLL)这两种通常互斥的量子态共存。
AI.motivation: 在一维电子系统中，费米液体态通常因电子相互作用形成Tomonaga-Luttinger液体(TLL)，或因Peierls不稳定性形成绝缘的电荷密度波(CDW)相。这两种现象通常相互排斥，在真实材料中共存的情况极为罕见。
AI.method: 通过实验测量(电输运、角分辨光电子能谱)和理论计算相结合的方法。实验上观测到CDW的证据(晶胞内二聚化和~250 meV的光学带隙)以及TLL行为的证据(温度、偏压和电子能量的幂律标度)。能带计算揭示了费米能级附近孤立的线性色散一维能带。
AI.result: 发现Cs₁₋δCr₃S₃同时表现出CDW和TLL特征。Cs空位将费米能级调节到线性色散的价带中，使得TLL行为得以观测而不破坏CDW序。布里渊区边界的一维费米面因晶胞内键对称破缺而打开能隙。
AI.conclusion: 该工作确立了Cs₁₋δCr₃S₃作为罕见的材料平台，其中两种对抗的费米液体不稳定性共存并交织，为一维系统中涌现量子现象的研究开辟了新途径。

title: Identification and Prediction of Photoplasticity in Semiconductors Using Feature Engineering and Machine learning
summary: Photoplasticity, the light-induced change in plastic deformation, plays a pivotal role in the mechanical durability and manufacturing of semiconductor materials. Yet, its governing mechanisms remain incompletely understood, owing to the interplay of coupled multiphysics factors. Here, we conduct high-throughput nanoindentation measurements to compile a dataset of paired hardness values in dark and light conditions. Then, we engineer physics-informed descriptors spanning electrical, mechanical, and optical properties, and identify the ten most informative features, including bandgap, breakdown field, and refractive index, to enable an interpretable machine learning framework that yields transferable design rules for light-tunable semiconductor mechanics. By identifying and predicting photoplasticity in semiconductors, this work provides a practical pathway for extracting mechanism-linked, transferable guidelines to engineer light-responsive mechanical behavior in semiconductor materials and devices.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个可解释的机器学习框架，利用物理信息描述符预测半导体材料的光塑性效应，识别出带隙、击穿场和折射率等关键特征，为设计光响应机械行为提供指导原则。
AI.motivation: 光塑性（光诱导塑性变形变化）对半导体材料的机械耐久性和制造至关重要，但其调控机制因多物理场耦合而尚未完全理解，需要系统研究来揭示其内在规律。
AI.method: 通过高通量纳米压痕测量收集暗光和光照条件下的硬度配对数据集；构建涵盖电学、力学和光学性质的物理信息描述符；筛选出10个最具信息量的特征；建立可解释的机器学习框架来预测光塑性效应。
AI.result: 识别出包括带隙、击穿场和折射率在内的10个关键特征，建立了能够预测半导体材料光塑性的可解释机器学习模型，获得了可迁移的设计规则。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解和预测半导体材料的光塑性效应提供了实用框架，通过机制关联的可迁移指导原则，为设计光响应机械行为的半导体材料和器件开辟了新途径。

title: Shining light on short-range atomic ordering in semiconductors alloys
comment: 10 pages in the main draft, with 4 pages in Methods section. 4 Figures in total
summary: The functional properties of semiconductors are typically controlled by tuning their average chemical composition and their state of strain, and by controlling their long-range structural order, including the presence of extended defects such as dislocations and grain boundaries. In addition to these approaches, theoretical predictions suggest that short-range order (SRO) of atoms in group-IV semiconductor alloys can modify the bandgap, a defining property of any semiconductor. Herein, a new machine learning enabled, computation-guided methodology for extended X-ray absorption fine structure (EXAFS) analysis of SRO is used to quantify the effects of local atomic order on the band gap of germanium-tin (GeSn) alloy single crystal nanostructures with well-controlled strain and composition. Correlative analysis of EXAFS and photoluminescence (PL) measured from the nanostructures establishes the relationship between bandgap and the Warren-Cowley short-range order (WC-SRO) parameter of the GeSn alloys. It is further demonstrated that, for a given average as-deposited composition, SRO can be tuned readily and over a large range by post-deposition annealing of the alloy crystals. This work indicates that control of SRO can be an important design degree of freedom, along with factors such as average composition and strain, for band engineering, and suggests the potential for atomistic determination and tuning of SRO in other semiconductor alloy systems.

AI.tldr: 通过机器学习辅助的EXAFS分析，量化了GeSn合金中短程有序对带隙的影响，建立了带隙与WC-SRO参数的关系，并展示了通过退火调控SRO的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统半导体性能调控主要依赖平均成分、应变和长程结构有序度，但理论预测短程有序（SRO）也能影响带隙。本研究旨在实验验证并量化SRO对GeSn合金带隙的影响。
AI.method: 采用机器学习辅助的计算引导EXAFS分析方法，结合光致发光（PL）测量，对具有精确控制应变和成分的GeSn合金单晶纳米结构进行相关分析。
AI.result: 建立了带隙与Warren-Cowley短程有序参数（WC-SRO）的定量关系，并证明通过退火处理可以在固定平均成分下大范围调控SRO。
AI.conclusion: SRO控制可以成为与平均成分和应变同等重要的带隙工程设计自由度，该方法有望推广到其他半导体合金系统的原子级SRO测定与调控。

title: Exciton Polariton-Polariton Interactions in Transition-Metal Dichalcogenides
comment: Main text: 11 pages, 5 figures Supplementary information: 19 pages, 8 figures
summary: Microscopic insights into nonlinear interactions are essential for advancing polaritonic devices. Existing studies often rely on phenomenological models that overlook important many-body processes. Based on a material-specific and predictive approach, we investigate monolayer and homobilayer MoS$_2$ embedded in a Fabry-Pérot cavity to characterize the exchange, saturation, and dipole-dipole contributions to polariton-polariton interactions in these technologically promising materials. A key finding is that the exchange interaction induces asymmetric energy shifts of the lower and upper polariton branches in a detuned cavity, a behavior driven by the difference in their excitonic character. Furthermore, we demonstrate that temperature and electron-photon coupling determine the energy renormalization through the equilibrium polariton distribution. In homobilayers, the dipole-dipole interaction is mediated by the interlayer character, enabling electrical control and facilitating the electric-field-induced closing of anti-crossings due to dipolar-interaction shifts. The gained insights on polariton-polariton interactions are important for the development of ultra-compact polaritonic circuitry.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过材料特异性方法研究了MoS₂单层和同质双层中的极化子-极化子相互作用，揭示了交换、饱和和偶极-偶极相互作用的贡献，为紧凑型极化子电路开发提供重要见解。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖现象学模型，忽略了重要的多体过程。需要基于材料特异性的预测性方法来深入理解极化子-极化子相互作用，这对推进极化子器件发展至关重要。
AI.method: 采用材料特异性和预测性方法，研究嵌入法布里-珀罗腔中的MoS₂单层和同质双层，表征交换、饱和和偶极-偶极相互作用对极化子-极化子相互作用的贡献。
AI.result: 交换相互作用在失谐腔中引起上下极化子支的不对称能量移动；温度和电子-光子耦合通过平衡极化子分布决定能量重整化；同质双层中偶极-偶极相互作用由层间特性介导，可实现电控制和电场诱导的反交叉闭合。
AI.conclusion: 获得的极化子-极化子相互作用见解对开发超紧凑极化子电路具有重要意义，特别是在MoS₂这类有前景的材料中，为电控极化子相互作用提供了新途径。

title: Exact $\mathbb{Z}_2$ electromagnetic duality of $\mathbb{Z}_2$ toric code is non-Clifford
summary: The 2D $\mathbb{Z}_2$ toric code admits a global symmetry exchanging electric and magnetic quasiparticles, known as electromagnetic duality. Known realizations include lattice translation symmetry, an exact $\mathbb{Z}_4$ symmetry generated by a Clifford circuit, and an exact $\mathbb{Z}_2$ symmetry generated by a non-Clifford circuit. We show that a Clifford electromagnetic duality cannot realize an exact internal $\mathbb{Z}_2$ symmetry. This is proved rigorously for symmetries with coarse translation invariance by $l$ lattice units for generic odd $l$. Therefore an exact internal $\mathbb{Z}_2$ electromagnetic duality must be non-Clifford, whereas generic internal Clifford realization necessarily has $\mathbb{Z}_{2^m}$ algebra with $m\ge 2$. Our result suggests an unexpected connection between exact electromagnetic duality and Clifford hierarchy of circuits.

AI.tldr: 2D Z₂ toric code的电磁对偶性无法通过Clifford电路实现精确的内部Z₂对称性，必须使用非Clifford电路
AI.motivation: 研究2D Z₂ toric code中电磁对偶性的实现方式，特别是探索Clifford电路能否实现精确的内部Z₂对称性
AI.method: 通过数学证明，对于具有粗粒度平移不变性（平移l个晶格单位，l为奇数）的对称性，严格证明Clifford电磁对偶无法实现精确的内部Z₂对称性
AI.result: Clifford电磁对偶无法实现精确的内部Z₂对称性，必须使用非Clifford电路；而通用的内部Clifford实现必然具有Z_{2^m}代数（m≥2）
AI.conclusion: 精确的电磁对偶性与电路的Clifford层次结构之间存在意想不到的联系，精确的内部Z₂电磁对偶必须是非Clifford的

title: Topological-Mechanical Degeneracy and Phenomenological Mapping in the Rigidity Percolation of Covalent Networks
summary: We study rigidity percolation in random covalent networks to establish the pure topological baseline of the floppy-to-rigid transition. Using a generating-function mean-field theory on configuration-model graphs, we report three results. First, we prove that the onset of the topological giant rigid component (GRC) coincides with the mechanical Maxwell isostatic point (_c = 2.4) -- a topological-mechanical degeneracy that holds in the locally tree-like limit and provides a clean reference frame, free of spatial correlations, for interpreting pebble-game deviations in physical glasses. Second, finite-size scaling (N in [500, 8000]) locates a quantitative internal geometric marker inside the Boolchand intermediate phase ( in [2.28, 2.46]): at * = 2.436 +/- 0.006, the GRC reaches 12.5% of the system, pinning for the first time a specific topological milestone within this self-organized window. Third, the same 12.5% fraction emerges as the phenomenological analogue of committed-minority tipping thresholds (10-15%) observed in social and biological networks, suggesting a deeper universality in how sparse topological backbones tip macroscopic transitions.

AI.tldr: 研究随机共价网络中的刚性渗流，建立从柔性到刚性转变的纯拓扑基准，发现拓扑巨型刚性组件与机械麦克斯韦等静压点重合，并在Boolchand中间相内定位了12.5%的临界拓扑里程碑。
AI.motivation: 建立物理玻璃中从柔性到刚性转变的纯拓扑基准框架，消除空间相关性影响，为理解实际玻璃中的pebble-game偏差提供干净的参考系。
AI.method: 使用生成函数平均场理论分析配置模型图，结合有限尺寸缩放分析（N在500到8000之间），研究随机共价网络中的刚性渗流。
AI.result: 1. 拓扑巨型刚性组件（GRC）的起始点与机械麦克斯韦等静压点（⟨c⟩=2.4）重合；2. 在Boolchand中间相（⟨c⟩∈[2.28,2.46]）内定位了内部几何标记点⟨c⟩*=2.436±0.006，此时GRC达到系统的12.5%；3. 12.5%这一比例与社会和生物网络中观察到的10-15%承诺少数群体临界阈值相似。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑巨型刚性组件的形成与机械等静压条件在局部树状极限下存在拓扑-机械简并性，12.5%的拓扑骨干比例可能是稀疏拓扑结构触发宏观转变的普遍临界阈值。

title: AI-ready design of realistic 2D materials and interfaces with Mat3ra-2D
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) models in materials science are predominantly trained on ideal bulk crystals, limiting their transferability to real-world applications where surfaces, interfaces, and defects dominate. We present Mat3ra-2D, an open-source framework for the rapid design of realistic two-dimensional materials and related structures, including slabs and heterogeneous interfaces, with support for disorder and defect-driven complexity. The approach combines: (1) well-defined standards for storing and exchanging materials data with a modular implementation of core concepts and (2) transformation workflows expressed as configuration-builder pipelines that preserve provenance and metadata. We implement typical structure generation tasks, such as constructing orientation-specific slabs or strain-matching interfaces, in reusable Jupyter notebooks that serve as both interactive documentation and templates for reproducible runs. To lower the barrier to adoption, we design the examples to run in any web browser and demonstrate how to incorporate these developments into a web application. Mat3ra-2D enables systematic creation and organization of realistic 2D- and interface-aware datasets for AI/ML-ready applications.

AI.tldr: Mat3ra-2D是一个开源框架，用于快速设计真实的二维材料及相关结构（包括表面、界面），支持无序和缺陷，旨在为AI/ML应用创建更真实的数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前材料科学中的AI/ML模型主要基于理想体材料晶体进行训练，这限制了它们在真实世界应用中的可迁移性，因为真实应用中表面、界面和缺陷起主导作用。
AI.method: 结合：(1) 用于存储和交换材料数据的标准化格式与核心概念的模块化实现；(2) 以配置-构建器管道形式表达的转换工作流，保留来源和元数据。通过可复用的Jupyter笔记本实现典型结构生成任务。
AI.result: 开发了Mat3ra-2D开源框架，支持在任意网络浏览器中运行示例，并展示了如何将这些开发成果整合到网络应用中，降低了采用门槛。
AI.conclusion: Mat3ra-2D能够系统性地创建和组织真实的二维材料和界面感知数据集，为AI/ML就绪的应用提供支持，解决了现有模型在真实材料结构上的局限性。

title: Resonant-enhanced tunneling electroresistance in sliding ferroelectric tunnel junctions
summary: The escalating demand for memory scaling requires switching mechanisms that remain reliable at atomic thickness while operating with minimal energy consumption. Sliding ferroelectricity provides a promising platform for this challenge: the spontaneous interfacial polarization emerging at superlubric, atomically thin van der Waals interfaces endows exceptional fatigue resistance, ultrafast switching and ultralow coercive fields. Nevertheless, the intrinsically weak polarization of sliding ferroelectrics limits the available signal window, necessitating new physical mechanisms that can transduce subtle polarization variations into pronounced resistance contrasts. Here, we address this challenge by introducing momentum-conserving resonant tunneling between lattice-aligned graphene electrodes. The resulting resonant sliding ferroelectric tunnel junction achieves a tunneling electroresistance (TER) ratio of up to 225.65%, substantially exceeding that of conventional sliding ferroelectric tunnel junctions. In addition, the device delivers a tunable TER ratio, multistate programmability, high current density, robust endurance with a small coefficient of variation (<0.69%), fast switching (20 ns), low switching energy (310 fJ), and low read voltage (<0.2 V). Collectively, these results establish a unique role for sliding ferroelectricity in bridging the gap of memory technology between performance and miniaturization, and open a new pathway toward next-generation nonvolatile memory technologies.

AI.tldr: 提出基于动量守恒共振隧穿的石墨烯电极滑动铁电隧道结，实现高达225.65%的隧道电阻比，具有多态可编程、高耐久性、快速切换和低能耗等优异性能。
AI.motivation: 内存技术微型化需求要求原子级厚度下仍保持可靠且低能耗的开关机制。滑动铁电性虽具有优异疲劳抗性、超快切换和低矫顽场，但其固有弱极化限制了信号窗口，需要新物理机制将微小极化变化转化为显著电阻对比。
AI.method: 引入晶格对齐石墨烯电极间的动量守恒共振隧穿机制，构建共振滑动铁电隧道结。利用滑动铁电界面产生的自发极化，结合共振隧穿效应放大极化变化对隧穿电流的调制作用。
AI.result: 隧道电阻比高达225.65%，远超传统滑动铁电隧道结。器件还展示可调TER比、多态可编程性、高电流密度、优异耐久性（变异系数<0.69%）、快速切换（20ns）、低切换能量（310fJ）和低读取电压（<0.2V）。
AI.conclusion: 滑动铁电性在连接内存技术性能与微型化之间具有独特作用，为下一代非易失性存储技术开辟了新途径。共振隧穿机制有效解决了滑动铁电弱极化的信号放大问题。

title: Superradiant Charge Density Waves in a Driven Cavity-Matter Hybrid
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures + 2 pages Supplemental Material with 1 figure
summary: Optical cavities enable strong, long-range, light-matter interactions that can drive collective ordering phenomena, such as superradiant self-organization in ultracold atomic gases. Extending these ideas to solid-state electron systems could enable continuous-wave optical control of electronic order, but is impeded by the mismatch between optical wavelengths and electronic length scales. Here, we propose a platform for realizing superradiant charge density waves (sCDWs) in doped, driven transition-metal dichalcogenides coupled to an optical cavity. A nanoscale grating generates electric fields at large in-plane optical momenta, allowing cavity photons to couple efficiently to electronic density fluctuations through exciton-polaron processes. Using a linear-stability analysis, we determine the threshold for superradiant ordering and map out the driven phase diagram. We show that tuning the grating periodicity to match the enhanced electronic density fluctuations - such as those near Wigner crystallization - substantially lowers the required pump intensity. Our results establish a novel route toward cavity-controlled electronic order in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 提出在掺杂、驱动的过渡金属二硫化物中实现超辐射电荷密度波的新平台，通过纳米光栅实现光腔光子与电子密度涨落的有效耦合
AI.motivation: 将超辐射自组织现象从超冷原子气体扩展到固态电子系统，实现电子序的光学连续波控制，但面临光学波长与电子长度尺度不匹配的挑战
AI.method: 使用纳米光栅产生大面内光学动量的电场，通过激子-极化子过程实现腔光子与电子密度涨落的高效耦合；采用线性稳定性分析确定超辐射有序阈值并绘制驱动相图
AI.result: 将光栅周期性与增强的电子密度涨落（如近维格纳结晶）匹配可显著降低所需泵浦强度，建立了量子材料中腔控制电子序的新途径
AI.conclusion: 该平台为实现固态电子系统中的超辐射电荷密度波提供了可行方案，为量子材料中光学控制电子序开辟了新方向

title: Spin waves and instabilities in the collinear four component antiferromagnetic materials
summary: The small amplitude perturbations of spins are considered in the four component antiferromagnetic materials with the equilibrium state of form up-up-down-down (uniaxial samples). Other configurations for the four component antiferromagnetic materials and two component antiferromagnetic materials are briefly considered for the comparison with main regime. Dispersion dependencies of two spin waves existing in the system are found if equilibrium spins are parallel to the anisotropy axis. Dispersion equation leading to a possibility of four spin waves is derived if equilibrium spins are perpendicular to the anisotropy axis. It is found that at least one solution has negative frequency square for all possible modules and signs of the anisotropy constants. Calculations are made for the one dimensional chain of classical spins in the approximation of the nearest neighbours interaction. Next, we also addressed the nearest neighbours interaction approximation in the limit of the continuous medium (for the Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert equation). Mostly applied form of the Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert equation goes beyond the nearest neighbours interaction approximation. The difference is described. Required assumptions are described.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了四组分反铁磁材料中自旋的小振幅扰动，主要关注up-up-down-down平衡态，分析了自旋波色散关系及其稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究多组分反铁磁材料中自旋波的色散特性和稳定性，特别关注不同平衡态配置（平行或垂直于各向异性轴）对自旋波行为的影响。
AI.method: 采用经典自旋的一维链模型，考虑最近邻相互作用近似，分别分析平衡自旋平行和垂直于各向异性轴的情况，推导色散方程，并扩展到连续介质极限的Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程。
AI.result: 发现平衡自旋平行于各向异性轴时存在两个自旋波模式，垂直于各向异性轴时可能产生四个自旋波模式，且至少一个解在所有各向异性常数下具有负频率平方（不稳定）。
AI.conclusion: 四组分反铁磁材料的自旋波行为强烈依赖于平衡态配置和各向异性方向，揭示了系统的不稳定性特征，并指出了标准Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程与最近邻相互作用近似的差异。

title: Categorical Time-Reversal Symmetries
summary: The classification of phases using categorical symmetries has greatly expanded the landscape of gapped and gapless phases. So far, however, these developments have largely been restricted to phases with unitary (higher-)categorical symmetries over $\mathbb{C}$. In this work, we incorporate anti-unitary symmetries, such as time-reversal symmetry $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$, and show that the relevant physical structures are naturally described by fusion categories over $\mathbb{R}$. A class of real fusion categories, which we call Galois-real fusion categories, provides the correct categorical model for anti-unitary symmetries. A simple example is the time-reversal symmetry $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$ itself. We discuss the basic structures of real fusion categories and present a range of examples, including the group-theoretical categories $(G^T)^ω$ and $\mathsf{Rep}(G^T)$ associated to anti-linear groups $G^T$, as well as non-invertible time-reversal symmetries described by a real analogue of Tambara--Yamagami fusion categories. We then classify gapped phases enriched with anti-linear symmetries in terms of module categories over Galois-real fusion categories. We furthermore apply the categorical formulation to prove dualities (i.e. gauge or Morita equivalences) of anti-linear symmetries generated by gauging subgroups. Complementing this, we also develop a Symmetry Topological Field Theory (SymTFT) framework, in which Galois-real fusion categories arise as boundary conditions of a $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$-enriched SymTFT. Morita equivalent anti-linear symmetries are shown to arise as different boundaries of the same $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$-enriched SymTFT.

AI.tldr: 该论文将反幺正对称性（如时间反演对称性）纳入范畴对称性框架，提出使用实数域上的融合范畴（特别是Galois-real融合范畴）来描述这类对称性，并建立了相应的分类理论和对称拓扑场论框架。
AI.motivation: 现有基于范畴对称性的相分类理论主要局限于复数域上的幺正对称性，而物理系统中普遍存在的反幺正对称性（如时间反演对称性）尚未被系统纳入这一框架。
AI.method: 引入实数域上的融合范畴，特别是Galois-real融合范畴作为反幺正对称性的范畴模型；建立基于Galois-real融合范畴模范畴的带反线性对称性的有能隙相分类理论；发展对称拓扑场论框架，将Galois-real融合范畴视为Z2^T-富化SymTFT的边界条件。
AI.result: 成功将时间反演等反幺正对称性纳入范畴对称性框架；建立了Galois-real融合范畴的数学结构；证明了通过规范子群产生的反线性对称性对偶性；展示了Morita等价的反线性对称性如何作为同一Z2^T-富化SymTFT的不同边界出现。
AI.conclusion: 实数域上的融合范畴（特别是Galois-real融合范畴）为描述反幺正对称性提供了正确的数学框架，扩展了范畴对称性在相分类中的应用范围，建立了统一处理幺正和反幺正对称性的理论体系。

title: Random fine structure and polarized luminescence of triplet excitons in semiconductor nanocrystals
