summary: We present a theory of polarized photoluminescence of triplet excitons in semiconductor nanocrystal ensembles with the random fine structure contributed by the electron-hole exchange and carrier-nuclear hyperfine interactions. The interaction parameters are assumed to be normally and isotropically distributed. In particular, the exchange interaction is described by the Gaussian orthogonal ensemble of random matrices. The intensity of luminescence as well as the optical orientation and alignment are calculated as functions of the fine structure splitting parameters and the exciton lifetime. We have also analyzed the suppression of optical alignment and enhancement of optical orientation in an external longitudinal magnetic field.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了半导体纳米晶系综中三重态激子偏振光致发光的理论，考虑了电子-空穴交换和载流子-核超精细相互作用导致的随机精细结构。
AI.motivation: 研究半导体纳米晶系综中三重态激子的偏振光致发光特性，理解随机精细结构（由交换相互作用和超精细相互作用引起）对激子发光偏振特性的影响。
AI.method: 建立理论模型，假设相互作用参数服从正态和各向同性分布，其中交换相互作用用高斯正交随机矩阵系综描述，计算发光强度、光学取向和光学对准作为精细结构分裂参数和激子寿命的函数。
AI.result: 计算得到了发光强度、光学取向和光学对准随精细结构分裂参数和激子寿命的变化关系，并分析了纵向磁场下光学对准的抑制和光学取向的增强效应。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为理解半导体纳米晶系综中三重态激子的偏振发光特性提供了框架，揭示了随机精细结构和外部磁场对激子偏振特性的重要影响。

title: The Shape of Chocolate: A Topological Perspective on Food Microstructure
summary: We present a computational framework for characterizing the molecular self-organization of cocoa butter (Theobroma cacao) during dark chocolate tempering through the lens of Topological Data Analysis (TDA). A physics-inspired particle simulation models N=100 triglyceride molecules across the full temperature range 15--60 degrees C, spanning all six crystalline polymorphs of cocoa butter (Forms I--VI) as well as the melt and superheating regimes. At each temperature tick, we construct a Vietoris-Rips filtration and compute the persistent homology groups H0 (connected components), H1 (independent cycles), and H2 (3D voids). The resulting persistence diagrams are analyzed via persistent entropy E = -sum_i p_i log2(p_i), where p_i = l_i / sum_j l_j and l_i = death_i - birth_i denotes feature lifetime; essential classes are assigned death = m+1 (m = eps_max) following the standard persistent entropy convention (Rucco 2026, arXiv:2602.09058). Our results demonstrate that Form V (the optimal tempering polymorph, 29.5--34 degrees C) is characterized by a distinctive topological signature: a local minimum in the H0 persistent entropy (E0 = 5.74 +/- 0.04 bits), a pronounced depression in the first Betti number beta_1 (1562 +/- 35), and a global minimum in the H2 entropy (E2 = 12.29 +/- 0.25 bits) reflecting coherent inter-bilayer lamellar cavities. Via Theorem 1 and Corollary 1 of Rucco (2026), persistent entropy is proven to separate the ordered and disordered phases by an asymptotically non-vanishing gap whenever a phase transition induces the creation or destruction of topological mass at macroscopic scales -- a condition we verify empirically across all eight cocoa butter regimes. These findings suggest that TDA-based metrics could serve as non-invasive quality indicators for industrial chocolate tempering processes.

AI.tldr: 利用拓扑数据分析研究可可脂在巧克力调温过程中的分子自组织，发现最佳调温晶型（Form V）具有独特的拓扑特征，可作为工业巧克力调温的非侵入性质量指标。
AI.motivation: 研究可可脂在巧克力调温过程中的分子自组织特性，寻找能够表征不同晶型相变的拓扑特征，为工业巧克力调温过程提供非侵入性质量监控方法。
AI.method: 采用物理启发的粒子模拟100个甘油三酯分子在15-60°C温度范围内的行为，覆盖所有六种可可脂晶型。使用Vietoris-Rips过滤计算持久同调群（H0、H1、H2），通过持久熵分析拓扑特征。
AI.result: Form V晶型（29.5-34°C）具有独特的拓扑特征：H0持久熵局部最小值（5.74±0.04比特）、第一贝蒂数显著下降（1562±35）、H2熵全局最小值（12.29±0.25比特）。持久熵能够有效区分有序和相变相。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑数据分析的度量指标可作为工业巧克力调温过程的非侵入性质量指标，持久熵能够检测相变引起的拓扑质量变化，为巧克力质量控制提供新方法。

title: Twist-Angle Engineering of Moiré Potentials for High-Performance Ionics in Bilayer Graphene
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, (SI: 3 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables)
summary: Controlling ion transport is a fundamental challenge for advanced energy storage. Bilayer graphene offers a unique platform for modulating ion diffusion via twist-angle-dependent moire superlattices, yet conventional stacking configurations face an inherent trade-off: AA stacking provides stable Li intercalation but high diffusion barriers, while AB stacking enables fast diffusion but poor intercalation stability. Twisted bilayer graphene (tBLG) offers potential to overcome this limitation, yet systematic understanding across different twist angles remains limited. Here, we investigate Li intercalation in tBLG using first-principles density functional theory, evaluating intercalation energies and diffusion barriers across multiple twist angles through potential energy surface (PES) mapping. The Sigma 37 structure (9.43 degrees) simultaneously achieves the most favorable intercalation energy (-2.39 eV) and the lowest diffusion barrier (0.14 eV) among all structures examined, resolving the conventional stacking trade-off. Furthermore, using the Smooth Overlap of Atomic Positions (SOAP) descriptor, we demonstrate that the PES is governed by local atomic environments and that a model trained on limited structures predicts the PES of untested configurations with high accuracy. This transferability enables efficient screening without exhaustive first-principles calculations, establishing a systematic framework for twist-angle engineering of ion transport in two-dimensional layered materials.

AI.tldr: 扭曲双层石墨烯（tBLG）通过特定扭转角（9.43°的Sigma 37结构）同时实现了有利的锂嵌入能和低扩散势垒，解决了传统堆叠中稳定性与扩散速度的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统双层石墨烯存在固有权衡：AA堆叠提供稳定锂嵌入但扩散势垒高，AB堆叠扩散快但嵌入稳定性差。扭曲双层石墨烯有潜力克服这一限制，但不同扭转角下的系统理解仍然有限。
AI.method: 使用第一性原理密度泛函理论研究tBLG中的锂嵌入，通过势能面映射评估多个扭转角的嵌入能和扩散势垒，并采用SOAP描述符分析局部原子环境对势能面的影响。
AI.result: Sigma 37结构（9.43°）在所有测试结构中同时实现了最有利的嵌入能（-2.39 eV）和最低的扩散势垒（0.14 eV）。基于SOAP描述符的模型能够准确预测未测试结构的势能面。
AI.conclusion: 扭转角工程为二维层状材料中的离子传输调控提供了系统框架，通过有限结构训练的可转移模型能够高效筛选最优结构，无需大量第一性原理计算。

title: Robust Floquet-induced gap in irradiated graphite
summary: Floquet engineering provides an emerging pathway for tailoring the electronic states of quantum materials through time-periodic drive. A critical step along this direction is achieving light-induced modifications of the dynamical electronic structure, such as avoided-crossing gap at the Floquet Brillouin zone boundary, via efficient coupling of electrons with the coherent light-field. Here, we report robust Floquet-induced gap in bulk graphite that persists despite the presence of interlayer coupling and photo-excitation. Using time- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy with intense mid-infrared pumping, we directly reveal Floquet-induced gaps at resonance points both in the valence and conduction bands, accompanied by coherent Floquet sidebands. The gap and sidebands coexist with photo-excited carriers, yet their distinct timescales allow us to disentangle their origins. Our demonstration of robust Floquet-induced gaps establishes graphite as a platform for coherent manipulation of Dirac fermions and realization of light-engineered quantum phases.

AI.tldr: 在石墨中通过强中红外泵浦实现了稳健的Floquet诱导能隙，该能隙在光激发载流子存在下依然持续，为操控狄拉克费米子和实现光工程量子相提供了平台。
AI.motivation: Floquet工程为通过时间周期性驱动调控量子材料的电子态提供了新途径，但需要在存在层间耦合和光激发的情况下实现稳健的Floquet诱导能隙。
AI.method: 使用强中红外泵浦的时间分辨和角分辨光电子能谱技术，直接观测石墨中的Floquet诱导能隙和相干Floquet边带。
AI.result: 在价带和导带的共振点都观察到了Floquet诱导能隙，并伴随相干Floquet边带。这些特征与光激发载流子共存，但具有不同的时间尺度。
AI.conclusion: 石墨中稳健的Floquet诱导能隙的演示，为相干操控狄拉克费米子和实现光工程量子相提供了平台。

title: The rise of unconventional magnetism
summary: Unconventional magnetism represents a paradigm shift in condensed matter physics, effectively bridging the fast, high-density advantages of antiferromagnets with the facile read-write capability of ferromagnets. Recent developments in spin space group theory have established a systematic methodology to decouple magnetic geometry from relativistic spin-orbit coupling, driving the exploration of unconventional magnets that exhibit compensated magnetization with time-reversal-odd responses. Here, we review unconventional magnetism across three pivotal facets in momentum space: spin textures, quantum geometry, and emergent quasiparticles. From the perspective of symmetry analysis, we elucidate the mechanisms underlying time-reversal-odd physical responses, including non-relativistic spin splitting, anomalous and nonlinear Hall effects, and exotic electronic and magnonic topological phases. Finally, we provide a forward-looking perspective on coupling unconventional magnetism with ferroelectricity, superconductivity, and moiré engineering. By exploiting symmetry-driven insights, this review highlights the functional potential of unconventional magnets in developing next-generation, high-speed, and energy-efficient spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述论文探讨了非常规磁性，它结合了反铁磁体的快速高密度优势和铁磁体的易读写能力，重点分析了动量空间中的自旋纹理、量子几何和涌现准粒子，并展望了与铁电性、超导性和莫尔工程的耦合应用。
AI.motivation: 非常规磁性代表了凝聚态物理的范式转变，它试图弥合反铁磁体（具有快速、高密度优势）和铁磁体（具有易读写能力）之间的差距。自旋空间群理论的发展为解耦磁几何与相对论性自旋轨道耦合提供了系统方法，推动了具有补偿磁化和时间反演奇性响应的非常规磁体的探索。
AI.method: 论文采用综述方法，从对称性分析的角度，系统探讨非常规磁性在动量空间的三个关键方面：自旋纹理、量子几何和涌现准粒子。通过对称性分析阐明时间反演奇性物理响应的机制。
AI.result: 论文阐明了非常规磁性中时间反演奇性响应的机制，包括非相对论性自旋分裂、反常和非线性霍尔效应，以及奇异的电子和磁子拓扑相。这些发现揭示了非常规磁体在功能应用方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用对称性驱动的见解，这篇综述强调了非常规磁体在开发下一代高速、高能效自旋电子器件中的功能潜力。论文还展望了将非常规磁性与铁电性、超导性和莫尔工程耦合的前景，为未来研究指明了方向。

title: Observation of Floquet-induced gap in graphene
summary: Floquet engineering provides a powerful pathway for creating non-equilibrium phases of matter with tailored electronic structures and properties through time-periodic driving. As the original theoretical prototype, graphene established the framework in which the Floquet topological insulator with light-induced anomalous Hall effect was proposed. However, the defining spectroscopic signature of Floquet engineering in graphene--light-induced hybridization (avoided-crossing) gap at Floquet band crossings, has remained experimentally elusive. Here, we report direct observation of Floquet-induced hybridization gap in monolayer graphene under resonant driving by a strong light field. Time- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy reveals gap opening at Floquet band crossings, accompanied by coherent Floquet sidebands. The gap exhibits pronounced momentum anisotropy, featuring two Dirac nodes protected by the spatiotemporal symmetry and tunable by light polarization. These results provide long-sought experimental demonstration of Floquet band engineering in graphene, opening up opportunities for light-field engineered quantum phases in graphene and related materials.

AI.tldr: 在强光场共振驱动下，实验首次直接观测到石墨烯中Floquet诱导的杂化能隙，验证了Floquet能带工程理论
AI.motivation: Floquet工程为通过时间周期性驱动创造非平衡相提供了强大途径，但石墨烯中Floquet诱导的杂化能隙这一关键光谱特征一直缺乏实验证据
AI.method: 使用强光场对单层石墨烯进行共振驱动，采用时间和角度分辨光电子能谱技术观测Floquet能带交叉处的能隙打开
AI.result: 直接观测到Floquet诱导的杂化能隙，伴随相干Floquet边带；能隙呈现明显的动量各向异性，具有两个受时空对称性保护的狄拉克节点，可通过光偏振调控
AI.conclusion: 首次实验证实了石墨烯中的Floquet能带工程，为石墨烯及相关材料中光场调控量子相开辟了新机遇

title: Incipient magnetic instability in RuO$_2$ with random phase approximation
summary: We study the instability in RuO$_2$ using the Hartree-Fock approximation followed by the random phase approximation. We employ a three-orbital Hubbard model without spin-orbit coupling. An analysis of the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the static susceptibility in the non-magnetic phase for various local interaction parameters $U$, $J_H$, and hole doping $n$ shows that the spin susceptibility is the dominant response channel. In the stoichiometric system without spin-orbit coupling, commensurate altermagnetic order is identified as the leading instability at sufficiently low temperatures, whereas at higher temperatures or finite hole doping, incommensurate wave vectors emerge. To elucidate the origin of the magnetic instability, we analyze the band spitting by the staggered Weiss field and discuss the qualitative difference between altermagnets and antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 使用Hartree-Fock和RPA方法研究RuO₂的不稳定性，发现自旋磁化率是主导响应通道，在无自旋轨道耦合的化学计量系统中，低温下出现共线反铁磁序，高温或空穴掺杂下出现非共线波矢。
AI.motivation: 研究RuO₂中的磁不稳定性，特别是探索其磁序类型和相变行为，理解反铁磁体与反铁磁体之间的本质区别。
AI.method: 采用Hartree-Fock近似结合随机相位近似(RPA)，使用无自旋轨道耦合的三轨道Hubbard模型，分析不同局域相互作用参数(U, J_H)和空穴掺杂(n)下非磁相中的静态磁化率特征值和特征向量。
AI.result: 自旋磁化率是主导响应通道；在无自旋轨道耦合的化学计量系统中，低温下共线反铁磁序是主要不稳定性；高温或有限空穴掺杂下出现非共线波矢；通过分析交错Weiss场引起的能带分裂，阐明了反铁磁体与反铁磁体的本质区别。
AI.conclusion: RuO₂中的磁不稳定性主要由自旋响应主导，其磁序类型随温度和掺杂变化，研究揭示了反铁磁体与反铁磁体之间的定性差异，为理解这类材料的磁性质提供了理论基础。

title: Light-Tunable Giant Anomalous Hall Effect in the Flat-Band Magnetic Weyl Semimetal $\mathrm{AlFe_2O_4}$
summary: Achieving a giant anomalous Hall effect (AHE) and enabling its effective tuning are fundamental goals for topological spintronics. Magnetic Weyl semimetals hosting flat bands offer a promising route to maximize the AHE. However, while theoretical models are well-established, realistic material candidates remain scarce. Since the intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) is topologically dictated by the momentum separation ($κ$) between Weyl nodes, actively manipulating remains a key challenge. Here, through comprehensive first-principles calculations, we establish the inverse spinel $\mathrm{AlFe_2O_4}$ as a realistic ferromagnetic half-metallic platform integrating three-dimensional flat bands and Weyl physics. Spin-orbit coupling induces a single pair of Weyl nodes, yielding a giant intrinsic AHC of $398\ \mathrm{S}\cdot\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$. By constructing a symmetry-constrained tight-binding model, we uncover a deterministic relationship between microscopic electronic couplings and the macroscopic AHE. Exploiting this via Floquet engineering with circularly polarized light, we demonstrate that the effective couplings are dynamically suppressed. This optical modulation controllably enlarges $κ$, shortens the topological Fermi arcs, and drives a dramatic, quantitative suppression of the AHC, providing a practical blueprint for ultrafast, light-controlled topological transport.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现反尖晶石AlFe₂O₄是一种具有三维平带和外尔物理的铁磁半金属平台，通过圆偏振光可实现反常霍尔电导的快速光控调制。
AI.motivation: 实现巨大的反常霍尔效应及其有效调控是拓扑自旋电子学的基本目标。磁性外尔半金属中的平带为实现最大反常霍尔效应提供了有希望的途径，但理论模型虽已建立，实际材料候选仍然稀缺，且如何主动调控由外尔节点动量分离决定的拓扑反常霍尔电导仍是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过综合第一性原理计算，确定反尖晶石AlFe₂O₄作为铁磁半金属平台；构建对称性约束的紧束缚模型揭示微观电子耦合与宏观反常霍尔效应之间的确定性关系；利用圆偏振光进行Floquet工程，动态抑制有效耦合。
AI.result: 自旋轨道耦合诱导产生单对外尔节点，产生398 S·cm⁻¹的巨大本征反常霍尔电导；光学调制可控制性地扩大外尔节点动量分离κ，缩短拓扑费米弧，并实现反常霍尔电导的显著定量抑制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为超快、光控拓扑输运提供了实用蓝图，通过Floquet工程实现了对反常霍尔效应的主动调控，为拓扑自旋电子学材料设计和器件应用开辟了新途径。

title: Topological Optical Chirality Dichroism
summary: We report on a universal topological dichroism of chiral three-dimensional systems in response to the chirality of light. We show that chiral topological invariants result in integer-quantized dichroic excitation rate differences. Moreover, we demonstrate that such topological effects arise more generally from coupling optical chirality to higher tensor Berry curvatures and Dixmier-Douady invariants of quantum states, including Hopf indices. We finally propose an experimental setup that leverages superchiral light as a smoking-gun probe of chiral band topologies in three-dimensional materials. Our findings establish an optical route for probing to date unobserved chiral electronic band topologies.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现三维手性系统中存在普适的拓扑二色性，手性拓扑不变量导致整数化的二色性激发率差异，并提出利用超手性光探测三维材料中的手性能带拓扑。
AI.motivation: 目前尚未观测到三维材料中的手性电子能带拓扑结构，需要开发新的探测方法。光与物质相互作用中的手性响应可能为探测这些拓扑结构提供新途径。
AI.method: 通过理论分析手性拓扑不变量与光学二色性的关系，证明手性拓扑不变量导致整数化的二色性激发率差异。将光学手性与高阶张量贝里曲率和Dixmier-Douady不变量（包括Hopf指数）耦合，揭示更一般的拓扑效应。提出利用超手性光作为实验探测方案。
AI.result: 发现三维手性系统存在普适的拓扑二色性，手性拓扑不变量产生整数化的二色性激发率差异。光学手性与高阶拓扑不变量耦合产生更广泛的拓扑效应。提出的超手性光实验方案可作为探测手性能带拓扑的确证性方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了探测三维材料中手性电子能带拓扑的光学途径，为观测迄今未发现的手性拓扑结构提供了新方法，超手性光可作为探测这些拓扑特征的确证性探针。

title: Anomalous Hall Conductivity as an Effective Means of Tracking the Floquet Weyl Nodes in Quasi-One-Dimensional $β$-Bi$_4$I$_4$
summary: While Floquet engineering offers a powerful paradigm for manipulating topological phases, particularly Floquet Weyl semimetals, establishing an experimentally feasible strategy for tracking the dynamic evolution of such states remains a significant challenge. Here, we propose that the anomalous Hall effect (AHE), as a sensitive, all-electrical probe, can be used to track Floquet Weyl nodes. Using first-principles calculations and symmetry analysis on the quasi-one-dimensional material $β$-Bi$_4$I$_4$, we demonstrate that circularly polarized light breaks time-reversal symmetry, driving the system from a trivial insulator into a Floquet Weyl semimetal phase characterized by a nonzero Berry curvature flux. Crucially, by continuously tuning the polarization phase $\varphi$ of the driving field, we show that the trajectory of the induced Weyl nodes is highly controllable, leading to their migration and eventual annihilation at high-symmetry points. We reveal that the anomalous Hall conductivity maps directly onto this topological evolution, serving as a definitive fingerprint for the generation and dynamics of Weyl nodes.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用反常霍尔效应作为全电学探针来追踪Floquet外尔半金属中动态外尔节点的演化，通过在β-Bi₄I₄材料中调控光场偏振相位实现对外尔节点轨迹的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 虽然Floquet工程为操控拓扑相（特别是Floquet外尔半金属）提供了强大范式，但建立实验可行的策略来追踪这些态的动力学演化仍然是一个重大挑战。需要找到能够实时监测外尔节点生成和演化的实验方法。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算和对称性分析，研究准一维材料β-Bi₄I₄在圆偏振光照射下的响应。通过连续调节驱动场的偏振相位φ，控制诱导外尔节点的轨迹，并分析反常霍尔电导率与拓扑演化的对应关系。
AI.result: 圆偏振光打破时间反演对称性，将系统从平庸绝缘体驱动到Floquet外尔半金属相，具有非零贝里曲率通量。通过调控偏振相位φ，外尔节点可在高对称点处迁移并最终湮灭。反常霍尔电导率直接映射到这种拓扑演化，成为外尔节点生成和动力学的明确指纹。
AI.conclusion: 反常霍尔效应可作为敏感的全电学探针来追踪Floquet外尔节点，为实验监测Floquet拓扑相的动态演化提供了可行策略。该方法通过电学测量直接反映拓扑相变，具有重要的实验应用价值。

title: Electrically and Magnetically Tunable Charge-Density-Wave Transport in Quasi-2D h-BN/1T-TaS2 Thin-Film Heterostructures
summary: Controlling collective electronic phases in low-dimensional materials is a central challenge for developing technologies based on charge-density waves. Here, we report that perpendicular electric and magnetic fields can be used to tune charge-density-wave transport in the quasi-two-dimensional material 1T-TaS2. Using h-BN-encapsulated thin-film heterostructures with both top-gate and bottom-gate configurations, we find that electrical gating produces a non-monotonic shift in the depinning threshold, a behavior distinct from that of quasi-one-dimensional charge-density-wave systems. We further show that a perpendicular magnetic field increases the threshold voltage for domain depinning and can drive the nearly commensurate-to-incommensurate charge-density-wave phase transition, demonstrating magnetic control over a two-dimensional electron-lattice condensate. The obtained results shed light on mechanisms governing charge-density-wave domain dynamics and reveal combined electrical and magnetic-field control as a strategy for engineering low-power-dissipation devices and electronics for extreme environments.

AI.tldr: 垂直电场和磁场可调控二维材料1T-TaS2中的电荷密度波输运，实现电控非单调阈值变化和磁控相变，为低功耗器件提供新策略。
AI.motivation: 控制低维材料中的集体电子相是电荷密度波技术发展的核心挑战，需要探索新的调控手段。
AI.method: 使用h-BN封装薄膜异质结构，配置顶栅和底栅，研究垂直电场和磁场对电荷密度波输运的影响。
AI.result: 电场产生非单调的脱钉阈值变化，磁场增加脱钉阈值电压并能驱动近公度到非公度相变，实现二维电子-晶格凝聚体的磁控。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了电荷密度波畴动力学机制，电-磁联合调控为极端环境低功耗电子器件提供了新策略。

title: First-order polarization process as an alternative to antiferroelectricity
summary: Antiferroelectrics generate significant interest since their polarization versus electric field (PE) curves show typical double-hysteresis loops appealing for various applications. Unfortunately, antiferroelectrics are rare. In magnetic compounds, magnetization versus magnetic field (M-H) curves can show analogous double hysteresis loops not only in antiferromagnets but also in systems exhibiting field-induced first-order reorientation of the magnetization through a so-called first-order magnetization process. Here, we show that appealing double-hysteresis P-E loops can also appear from an unprecedented first-order polarization process. Focusing on non-polar CaTiO3, which can be turned ferroelectric under tensile strain, we study epitaxial thin films on differently-oriented NdGaO3 substrates using a combination of theoretical and experimental techniques. We uncover that a certain configuration exhibits double-hysteresis P-E loops that we rationalize from a field-induced abrupt rotation of the polarization. Such a first-order polarization process establishes a promising alternative pathway to achieve double hysterisis P-E loops appealing for practical applications.

AI.tldr: 在非极性CaTiO3薄膜中发现了类似反铁电的双回滞P-E曲线，源于电场诱导的极化矢量一级相变过程
AI.motivation: 反铁电材料具有独特的双回滞P-E曲线，在应用中很有吸引力，但这类材料稀少。磁学中类似的双回滞M-H曲线不仅出现在反铁磁体中，也出现在一级磁化过程中。本研究探索是否能在电学系统中实现类似的一级极化过程来获得双回滞P-E曲线。
AI.method: 以非极性CaTiO3为研究对象，通过拉伸应变使其转变为铁电体。在不同取向的NdGaO3衬底上生长外延薄膜，结合理论计算和实验技术进行研究。
AI.result: 在特定配置下观察到了双回滞P-E曲线，这被解释为电场诱导的极化矢量突然旋转，即一级极化过程。这种机制为获得双回滞P-E曲线提供了新的途径。
AI.conclusion: 发现了一种前所未有的电场诱导一级极化过程，能够在非极性材料中产生类似反铁电的双回滞P-E曲线，为实际应用开辟了新的可能性。

title: Work-Function-Resolved Imaging of Relaxation Oscillations and Chemical Spillover in CO Oxidation over Platinum Surfaces
summary: Chemical waves of CO oxidation on platinum surfaces exhibit complex spatio-temporal self-oscillations, yet the local electronic mechanisms driving their propagation remain poorly understood under operando conditions. In this work, we combine operando scanning electron microscopy with frequency-modulated Kelvin probe force microscopy (FM-KPFM) to simultaneously map secondary electron contrast and local work-function variations during CO oxidation on Pt. By utilizing the KPFM tip as a localized sensor, we provide the first work-function-resolved imaging of reaction fronts, enabling an unambiguous physical assignment of CO- and oxygen-covered states. Our results demonstrate that the spillover process of chemical wave-the transition and expansion of adsorbate phases-is characterized by a pronounced temporal asymmetry and spatial heterogeneity transition thresholds. KPFM identifies a rapid onset of oxygen coverage followed by a gradual, diffuse relaxation back to the CO-covered state, indicative of relaxation-type oscillations even at low pressures (10^-2 Pa). Correlative reaction-diffusion simulations reproduce this wave morphology, confirming that the high-resolution work-function signal provides unique insights into the internal structure and kinetic heterogeneity of the working catalyst surface.

AI.tldr: 利用FM-KPFM技术首次实现了CO氧化反应前沿的功函数分辨成像，揭示了Pt表面化学波传播的局部电子机制和时空不对称性。
AI.motivation: 铂表面CO氧化反应的化学波表现出复杂的时空自振荡，但在操作条件下驱动其传播的局部电子机制仍不清楚。
AI.method: 结合操作扫描电子显微镜和频率调制开尔文探针力显微镜（FM-KPFM），同时映射CO氧化过程中Pt表面的二次电子对比度和局部功函数变化。
AI.result: 首次实现了反应前沿的功函数分辨成像，明确区分了CO覆盖态和氧覆盖态；发现化学波溢出过程具有明显的时间不对称性和空间异质性；识别出氧覆盖的快速起始和CO覆盖态的逐渐扩散弛豫。
AI.conclusion: 高分辨率功函数信号为工作催化剂表面的内部结构和动力学异质性提供了独特见解，相关反应-扩散模拟证实了波形态的再现。

title: Oxygen as a dual function regulator in MoS2 CVD synthesis: enhancing precursor evaporation while modulating reaction kinetics
comment: 42 pages, 6 main text and 11 supplementary figures
summary: Molybdenum disulfide (MoS2) is a promising 2D transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) for optoelectronics and quantum technology applications, but faces challenges in scalable synthesis and defect engineering. Oxygen-assisted chemical vapor deposition (O-CVD), which introduces in-situ oxygen during growth, shows excellent potential in resolving both issues at once. Although co-flowing oxygen shows improvement in growth, the underlying mechanistic role of oxygen remains unclear. In this work, a combination of oxygen dosing experiments, density functional theory (DFT) calculations, computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations, and ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) simulations, uncover the dual role of oxygen in O-CVD. Firstly, AIMD reveals that oxygen increases MoO3 sublimation and enhances Mo3O9 supply. Concomitantly, DFT reveals that sulphur oxides, due to their bulkier nature than pure S2, limit the formation of reactive MoS6 intermediates. Subsequently, by experimentally varying the oxygen flow-interval, flow-rate, and flow-time, and correlating them with CFD simulations, we decouple oxygen's roles in source-poisoning prevention (i.e. MoO3 evaporation) and growth regulation. We find that maintaining a low sulphur-to-oxygen (S:O2) ratio at the MoO3 boat and substrate during nucleation, and a high S:O2 ratio at the substrate during growth is the key to obtaining large-area high-quality monolayer MoS2, confirmed by our optical measurements. Based on our understanding, we present a kinetic phase diagram for MoS2 synthesis, which will enable controlled oxygen dosing as a tuning parameter for scalable, defect-controlled monolayer MoS2 synthesis.

AI.tldr: 氧气辅助化学气相沉积(O-CVD)中氧气具有双重作用：促进MoO₃升华增加钼源供应，同时抑制MoS₆中间体形成以调控生长，通过控制硫氧比可获得大面积高质量单层MoS₂。
AI.motivation: MoS₂作为二维过渡金属硫化物在光电子和量子技术中应用前景广阔，但面临可扩展合成和缺陷控制的挑战。氧气辅助CVD(O-CVD)虽然显示出潜力，但氧气的具体作用机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用氧气剂量实验、密度泛函理论(DFT)计算、计算流体动力学(CFD)模拟和从头算分子动力学(AIMD)模拟相结合的方法，系统研究氧气在O-CVD中的双重作用机制。
AI.result: 氧气具有双重作用：1）AIMD显示氧气促进MoO₃升华，增加Mo₃O₉供应；2）DFT表明硫氧化物比纯S₂体积更大，限制反应性MoS₆中间体形成。通过控制成核期低硫氧比和生长期高硫氧比，可获得大面积高质量单层MoS₂。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了氧气在MoS₂ O-CVD生长中的双重作用机制，建立了动力学相图，为通过可控氧气剂量实现可扩展、缺陷可控的单层MoS₂合成提供了理论指导。

title: On a relationship between grain boundary free energy, grain boundary segregation, and grain boundary diffusion
summary: We present a detailed analysis of the universal relationship between grain boundary (GB) free energy and GB self-diffusion coefficient derived by Borisov et al. (1964). This relationship was expressed by a simple equation that was used in many publications to predict GB energies on the basis of experimental diffusion data. Meanwhile, the physical assumptions and approximations underlying the Borisov model are poorly understood. As a result, the Borisov equation was often used outside its intended limits. Here, we re-derive the Borisov equation from ground up, identifying its underlying assumptions, correcting some errors and inconsistencies, and extending the original model to the case of impurity diffusion and diffusion by the interstitialcy and interstitial-dumbbell mechanisms. The meaning of the key assumption of the Borisov model, related to the free energy of the activated complex, is discussed, and ways to test this assumption are proposed.

AI.tldr: 重新推导并扩展了Borisov等人（1964）提出的晶界自由能与自扩散系数之间的普适关系，修正了原模型中的错误和不一致之处，并将其扩展到杂质扩散、间隙机制和间隙哑铃机制的情况。
AI.motivation: Borisov等人提出的晶界自由能与自扩散系数关系式被广泛用于基于实验扩散数据预测晶界能量，但其物理假设和近似条件理解不足，导致该方程经常被超出其适用范围使用。
AI.method: 从基本原理重新推导Borisov方程，识别其潜在假设，修正错误和不一致之处，并将原始模型扩展到杂质扩散以及间隙机制和间隙哑铃机制扩散的情况。
AI.result: 建立了更严谨的晶界自由能与扩散系数关系模型，明确了Borisov模型的关键假设（与活化络合物自由能相关），并提出了验证这些假设的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过对Borisov模型的重新推导和扩展，澄清了其适用范围和限制，为更准确地利用扩散数据预测晶界能量提供了理论基础。

title: Coexistence of ferromagnetism and ferroelectricity in the van der Waals multiferroic CuIn0.2V0.8P2S6
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) multiferroics have emerged as a promising platform for next-generation multifunctional devices. Although recent studies have demonstrated that artificial heterostructures can combine dual ferroic orders and exhibit strong magnetoelectric coupling, their performance is sometimes limited by poor interface quality and inadequate long-term stability. By contrast, the realization of intrinsic single-phase materials with coexisting ferromagnetism and ferroelectricity remains a longstanding challenge in the field. Here we report the realization of a single-phase 2D vdW multiferroic system, CuIn0.2V0.8P2S6, which exhibits both ferromagnetism and room-temperature ferroelectricity. The intrinsic ferroelectric nature of CuIn0.2V0.8P2S6 was probed using ferroelectric tunnel junctions, which exhibit a large tunneling electroresistance with an ON/OFF ratio of 107 at 295 K. CuIn0.2V0.8P2S6 develops ferromagnetic ordering with the Curie temperature (TC) of 14.6 K, as evidenced by pronounced magnetic hysteresis and a relatively large remanent magnetization. Notably, the appearance of a magnetodielectric response below TC is consistent with the anticipated interplay between the ferromagnetic and ferroelectric orders. These results highlight a promising route toward single-phase van der Waals multiferroics with coexisting ferroic orders.

AI.tldr: 报道了一种单相二维范德华多铁材料CuIn0.2V0.8P2S6，同时具有铁磁性和室温铁电性，展现了磁电耦合效应。
AI.motivation: 当前人工异质结多铁材料存在界面质量差和长期稳定性不足的问题，而实现具有共存铁磁和铁电性的本征单相材料一直是该领域的长期挑战。
AI.method: 通过合成CuIn0.2V0.8P2S6单相二维范德华材料，利用铁电隧道结探测其铁电性质，测量磁滞回线确定铁磁特性，并研究磁介电响应来验证磁电耦合。
AI.result: 材料在室温下表现出铁电性，隧道电阻比达到10^7；在14.6K以下呈现铁磁性，具有明显的磁滞回线和较大的剩磁；在居里温度以下观察到磁介电响应，证实了铁磁和铁电序的相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了一种实现单相范德华多铁材料的新途径，为开发具有共存铁性序的多功能器件提供了有前景的平台。

title: Localization-driven exchange contrast in diffusion exchange spectroscopy
summary: Diffusion exchange spectroscopy (DEXSY) is a method to probe exchange between domains of varying confinement. Analyses of DEXSY signals typically assume Gaussian diffusion within distinct compartments and first-order exchange kinetics between them. Other situations can yield DEXSY signal contrast with respect to mixing time, however, leading to potentially erroneous interpretation. Here, we demonstrate that a one-dimensional compartment with reflecting boundaries and without relaxation can by itself produce such contrast in certain experimental regimes. The origin of this contrast is the diffusive mixing of spin isochromats initially near versus far from either boundary, as the former can be relatively coherent in an effect known as edge enhancement or signal localization. We consider DEXSY signals in the case of extended field gradients and identical encodings. Signals were generated via a numerical approach that solves the Bloch-Torrey equation in discrete space and time using matrix operators. We find that in the localization regime, an apparent first-order rate constant of exchange, $k$, can be extracted from DEXSY signals even in this minimal system. The measured $k$ is approximately proportional to $D/L^2$, where $D$ is the diffusivity and $L$ is the domain size. Typically, $k \approx π^2 D/L^2$. We attribute this localization-driven exchange to the relaxation of spatial magnetization modes with mixing time, noting that $π^2 D/L^2$ is the first non-zero eigenvalue of the Laplacian basis. These results demonstrate that DEXSY and related methods such as filter exchange spectroscopy (FEXSY) may not be specific to genuine barrier permeation.

AI.tldr: DEXSY信号分析中观察到的交换对比可能并非源于真实的隔室间交换，而是由具有反射边界的单维隔室内扩散混合引起，特别是在定位效应（边缘增强）区域。
AI.motivation: 传统DEXSY分析假设高斯扩散和一级交换动力学，但其他情况也可能产生类似信号对比，可能导致错误解释。需要探究在无真实交换的系统中是否会出现类似DEXSY信号。
AI.method: 通过数值方法求解离散时空中的Bloch-Torrey方程，使用矩阵算子生成DEXSY信号。研究具有反射边界的单维隔室系统，在扩展场梯度和相同编码条件下分析信号。
AI.result: 在定位效应区域，即使在这个最小系统中也能从DEXSY信号中提取出表观一级交换速率常数k。测量得到的k近似与D/L²成正比，通常k ≈ π²D/L²，这与拉普拉斯基的第一个非零特征值相关。
AI.conclusion: DEXSY及相关方法（如FEXSY）可能对真实的屏障渗透不具有特异性。观察到的交换对比可能源于空间磁化模式的弛豫，而非真实的隔室间交换，这对DEXSY数据的解释提出了重要警示。

title: Raman and Terahertz Spectroscopy of Low-Frequency Chiral Phonons in Amino Acids
summary: Chiral phonons are mirror-symmetric vibrations that correspond to twisting and rotational motions of atoms. In chiral biomolecules, they correspond to low-energy terahertz (THz)-range vibrations of the molecular segments involving dozens of atoms whose energies are sensitive to the chirality of the molecules and local atomic geometries. Here we present spectral signatures of chiral phonons in circularly polarized low-frequency Raman and Raman optical activity (ROA) spectra from crystals of several amino acids in different enantiomeric forms. Along with complementary THz circular dichroism (TCD) measurements, our ROA data reveal two sets of bisignate peaks in valine, alanine, tyrosine and proline between 1 and 4.5 THz that are more intense than the ROA peaks in the fingerprint region. Density functional theory (DFT) calculations on L-alanine attribute these modes to twisting and shearing molecular motions. The strong agreement between the ROA and TCD data demonstrates the power of these complementary vibrational spectroscopy techniques to identify chiral phonons in biomolecules, and offers new insights into their vibrational properties and interactions with circularly polarized light.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过圆偏振低频拉曼光谱和拉曼光学活性光谱，结合太赫兹圆二色性测量，揭示了氨基酸晶体中手性声子的光谱特征，为生物分子振动特性提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: 手性声子是原子扭转和旋转运动的镜像对称振动，在生物分子中对应太赫兹频段的低能振动。研究这些振动对于理解手性分子的结构和性质具有重要意义，但目前缺乏有效的光谱表征方法。
AI.method: 采用圆偏振低频拉曼光谱和拉曼光学活性光谱技术，结合太赫兹圆二色性测量，对多种氨基酸晶体的不同对映体形式进行光谱分析。同时使用密度泛函理论计算对L-丙氨酸的振动模式进行理论验证。
AI.result: 在缬氨酸、丙氨酸、酪氨酸和脯氨酸的1-4.5 THz范围内观察到两组双符号峰，其强度高于指纹区的ROA峰。DFT计算表明这些模式对应分子的扭转和剪切运动。ROA和TCD数据高度一致，验证了方法的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 圆偏振拉曼光谱和太赫兹圆二色性技术是识别生物分子中手性声子的有效互补方法，为研究手性分子的振动特性和与圆偏振光的相互作用提供了新的实验手段和理论见解。

title: Graphitic-C3N4/TiO2(B) S-scheme Heterojunctions for Efficient Photocatalytic H2 Production and Organic Pollution Degradation
summary: Achieving both broad solar-spectrum absorption and strong redox capability is critical for semiconductor photocatalysts in environmental remediation and energy conversion. Herein, an S-scheme heterojunction photocatalyst is constructed by coupling TiO2(B) nanorods with g-C3N4 nanosheets. Its well-matched band structure extends light absorption from the UV to the visible region and enables efficient charge separation. Under simulated sunlight irradiation, the 40 wt% g-C3N4/TiO2(B) heterojunction delivers a H2 evolution rate of 1.98 mmol g-1 h-1 for water reduction with methanol as the sacrificial agent, which is 1.5 and 2.0 times higher than those of pure g-C3N4 and TiO2(B), respectively. When exposed to amoxicillin wastewater instead of methanol solution, the heterojunction degrades 98.2% of amoxicillin and produces 20.70 umol g-1 of H2 within 90 min. Moreover, the heterojunction shows excellent photodegradation activity toward various organic antibiotics and dyes, owing to the S-scheme charge separation mechanism. This work highlights the promising potential of S-scheme heterojunctions for photocatalytic H2 production coupled with organic wastewater treatment.

AI.tldr: 构建TiO2(B)/g-C3N4 S型异质结光催化剂，实现宽光谱吸收和高效电荷分离，同时进行光催化产氢和有机废水处理
AI.motivation: 半导体光催化剂需要同时具备宽光谱吸收和强氧化还原能力，这在环境修复和能源转换中至关重要。本研究旨在开发一种能同时实现高效产氢和有机污染物降解的光催化剂。
AI.method: 通过耦合TiO2(B)纳米棒和g-C3N4纳米片构建S型异质结光催化剂，优化能带结构以扩展光吸收范围（从紫外到可见光）并促进电荷分离。
AI.result: 40 wt% g-C3N4/TiO2(B)异质结在模拟太阳光下产氢速率达1.98 mmol g-1 h-1，比纯g-C3N4和TiO2(B)分别提高1.5倍和2.0倍。在阿莫西林废水中，90分钟内降解98.2%污染物并产生20.70 μmol g-1氢气。对多种有机抗生素和染料均表现出优异光降解活性。
AI.conclusion: S型异质结光催化剂在同时实现光催化产氢和有机废水处理方面展现出巨大潜力，为环境修复和能源转换提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: A Comparative Study of Molecular Dynamics Approaches for Simulating Ionic Conductivity in Solid Lithium Electrolytes
summary: Accurate prediction of ionic conductivity is critical for the design of high-performance solid-state electrolytes in next-generation batteries. We benchmark molecular dynamics (MD) approaches for computing ionic conductivity in 21 lithium solid electrolytes for which experimental ionic conductivity has been previously reported in the literature. In particular, we compare simulations driven by density functional theory (DFT) and by universal machine-learning interatomic potentials (uMLIPs), namely a MACE foundation model. We find comparable performance between DFT and MACE, despite MACE on one GPU more than 350 times faster than DFT on a 64-CPU node. The framework developed here is designed to enable systematic comparisons with additional uMLIPs and fine-tuned models in future work.

AI.tldr: 比较DFT和MACE机器学习势在21种锂固态电解质离子电导率预测中的性能，发现两者精度相当但MACE快350倍以上
AI.motivation: 准确预测离子电导率对于设计下一代电池高性能固态电解质至关重要，需要评估不同计算方法在固态电解质中的表现
AI.method: 对21种锂固态电解质进行分子动力学模拟，比较基于密度泛函理论（DFT）和通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs，特别是MACE基础模型）两种方法的性能
AI.result: DFT和MACE在离子电导率预测方面表现出相当的性能，但MACE在单个GPU上的计算速度比DFT在64个CPU节点上快350倍以上
AI.conclusion: 开发的框架可用于未来系统比较更多uMLIPs和微调模型，MACE等机器学习方法在保持精度的同时大幅提升计算效率

title: Self-Limiting Mechanism of Anti-Stokes Optical Cooling in Diamond NV Centers
summary: Anti-Stokes optical cooling in diamond nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers is experimentally and numerically investigated. Photoluminescence-excitation spectroscopy reveals pronounced phonon-assisted anti-Stokes emission under excitation below the zero-phonon line (ZPL). However, the below-ZPL excitation drives photoinduced charge-state conversion between negatively-charged NV- and neutral NV0, thereby suppressing the NV- mediated cooling channel. Time-resolved photoluminescence (PL) measurements reveal an increase in the effective PL lifetime with excitation density, reflecting an increasing NV0 contribution. By fitting nanosecond and millisecond PL dynamics with a minimal rate-equation model, we extract effective optical pumping and charge-conversion rates, which enables us to quantitatively simulate the cooling performance. The simulations predict a self-limiting behavior of anti-Stokes cooling and clarify the excitation conditions under which net cooling can be sustained within this effective model. The estimated cooling power per NV center is comparable, on a microscopic basis, to values discussed for semiconductor quantum dots and rare-earth optical coolers. These results identify charge-state conversion as a key bottleneck for defect-based optical refrigeration.

AI.tldr: 钻石氮空位中心的反斯托克斯光学冷却研究，发现电荷态转换是冷却性能的关键瓶颈
AI.motivation: 研究钻石氮空位中心的反斯托克斯光学冷却机制，探索缺陷基光学制冷的关键限制因素
AI.method: 结合实验和数值模拟：使用光致发光激发光谱测量反斯托克斯发射，时间分辨PL测量分析电荷态转换，建立速率方程模型提取光学泵浦和电荷转换速率
AI.result: 发现低于零声子线激发会驱动NV-到NV0的电荷态转换，抑制冷却通道；模拟预测反斯托克斯冷却具有自限行为；每个NV中心的冷却功率与半导体量子点和稀土光学制冷器相当
AI.conclusion: 电荷态转换是缺陷基光学制冷的关键瓶颈，限制了反斯托克斯冷却的净冷却效果

title: Fractional Modeling of Thermoelastic Fracture Behavior in a Cracked PZT-4 Strip under Transient Thermal Loading
summary: This paper investigates the thermoelastic fracture response of a transversely isotropic piezoelectric strip containing a vertical insulated crack under transient thermal shock loading and pre-existing stress fields. The analysis is conducted within the framework of generalized fractional heat conduction using the Ezzat model, which incorporates thermal relaxation and memory-dependent effects. The problem is formulated as a mixed boundary value problem governed by fractional thermoelastic equations. The Laplace transform technique is employed to obtain temperature and coupled fields in the transform domain. The resulting system of singular integral equations is solved using the Lobatto-Chebyshev collocation method to determine the displacement discontinuity and the associated thermal stress intensity factors at the crack tips. The transient response in the time domain is recovered through numerical inversion of the Laplace transform using the Stehfest algorithm. Numerical results for PZT-4 are presented to examine the influence of fractional order, thermal relaxation time, pre-existing stresses, and geometric parameters on temperature distribution, thermoelastic stress fields, and stress intensity factors. The results demonstrate significant deviations from classical Fourier predictions, revealing wave-like thermal behavior and inherent memory effects associated with fractional heat conduction. The present formulation establishes a unified framework for the analysis of thermoelastic fracture in piezoelectric ceramics and provides insights into the design and reliability of smart structures operating under severe thermal conditions.

AI.tldr: 研究横向各向同性压电带中垂直绝缘裂纹在瞬态热冲击和预存应力场下的热弹性断裂响应，采用广义分数阶热传导Ezzat模型，分析分数阶、热弛豫时间等参数对温度分布和应力强度因子的影响。
AI.motivation: 研究压电陶瓷在恶劣热条件下的热弹性断裂行为，传统傅里叶热传导模型无法准确描述热波行为和记忆效应，需要建立包含热弛豫和记忆依赖效应的广义分数阶热传导模型来分析智能结构在热冲击下的可靠性。
AI.method: 采用Ezzat模型的广义分数阶热传导理论，将问题表述为混合边界值问题，使用拉普拉斯变换获得变换域中的温度和耦合场，采用Lobatto-Chebyshev配置法求解奇异积分方程组，通过Stehfest算法进行拉普拉斯逆变换恢复时域瞬态响应。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，分数阶、热弛豫时间、预存应力和几何参数对温度分布、热弹性应力场和应力强度因子有显著影响，与经典傅里叶预测存在明显偏差，揭示了热波行为和分数阶热传导固有的记忆效应。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为压电陶瓷热弹性断裂分析建立了统一框架，揭示了分数阶热传导模型在描述热波行为和记忆效应方面的优势，为在恶劣热条件下工作的智能结构设计和可靠性评估提供了重要见解。

title: Unconventional views on orbitronics supported by experimental results
summary: Emerging orbitronics assumes long-range orbital current transport, analogous to spin currents. However, recent theory and experiments challenge this view, showing rather local characters for orbital polarization and orbit-spin conversions. We study angular momentum generated by ferromagnetic resonance and thermal gradients in Ni/(Pt)Ti/Au heterostructures. The observed charge current produced is independent of Ti thickness up to 60 nm, incompatible with orbital transport in Ti. Instead, its magnitude depends on both Ti interfaces, evidencing spin-mediated transport in between after and before local orbit-spin interconversions.

AI.tldr: 实验表明轨道电流并非长程传输，而是通过界面局域轨道-自旋转换实现自旋介导传输
AI.motivation: 新兴轨道电子学假设轨道电流可以长程传输，类似于自旋电流。但最近的理论和实验挑战了这一观点，显示轨道极化和轨道-自旋转换具有局域特性。需要研究轨道角动量在铁磁共振和热梯度下的实际传输机制。
AI.method: 研究Ni/(Pt)Ti/Au异质结构中铁磁共振和热梯度产生的角动量。通过改变Ti层厚度（最高达60nm）来观察电荷电流的变化，分析传输机制。
AI.result: 观测到的电荷电流在Ti厚度达到60nm时仍保持不变，这与轨道在Ti中传输的预期不符。电流大小取决于Ti的两个界面，表明传输机制是：在界面发生局域轨道-自旋转换后，通过自旋介导在Ti层中传输，然后在另一界面再次转换。
AI.conclusion: 轨道电流并非长程传输，而是通过界面局域轨道-自旋转换实现自旋介导传输。这一发现对轨道电子学的基本假设提出了重要修正。

title: Quantification of magnetic interactions in van der Waals heterostructures using Lorentz transmission electron microscopy and electron holography
summary: Magnetic van der Waals (vdW) materials are promising for memory and logic applications because of their highly tunable magnetic properties and compatibility with vdW heterostructure devices. However, in conventional plan-view measurements, coupling between magnetic textures in stacked layers is difficult to resolve because the magnetic signal is integrated over the sample thickness. Here, these interactions are quantified in Fe$_3$GeTe$_2$ (FGT)/graphite/FGT heterostructures using cross-sectional Lorentz transmission electron microscopy and electron holography, enabling reconstruction of the local magnetic field within and between the layers. Domain alignment weakens with increasing FGT separation, yielding a dipolar coupling length scale of $λ= 34 \pm 4$ nm for the cross-sectional geometry studied here, corresponding to the average separation at which domain misalignment first emerges. This length scale coincides with an approximately 50\% reduction in the interlayer magnetic field relative to bulk FGT. Surface effects result in canting of the magnetic moments away from the easy axis up to $\sim$100 nm from a surface. Finally, the domain walls are narrow ($\sim$9 nm), while micromagnetic simulations reproduce the observed textures without invoking Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction. These results quantify the internal and stray fields in stacked vdW magnets and guide the design of devices that require controllable coupling between magnetic textures.

AI.tldr: 使用截面洛伦兹透射电镜和电子全息术研究Fe₃GeTe₂/石墨/Fe₃GeTe₂异质结构中的层间磁耦合，量化了磁畴对齐随层间距的变化，确定了偶极耦合长度尺度为34±4 nm。
AI.motivation: 传统平面测量难以解析堆叠层中磁纹理的耦合，因为磁信号在样品厚度上积分。需要量化vdW磁体异质结构中的层间相互作用，为需要可控磁耦合的器件设计提供指导。
AI.method: 采用截面洛伦兹透射电镜和电子全息术，结合微磁模拟，重建Fe₃GeTe₂/石墨/Fe₃GeTe₂异质结构层内和层间的局部磁场分布。
AI.result: 磁畴对齐随FGT层间距增加而减弱，偶极耦合长度尺度λ=34±4 nm；表面效应导致磁矩在表面附近100 nm内偏离易轴；畴壁宽度约9 nm；微磁模拟无需DMI即可重现观测到的磁纹理。
AI.conclusion: 该研究量化了堆叠vdW磁体的内部和杂散场，为需要可控磁耦合的器件设计提供了关键参数和指导，特别是偶极耦合长度尺度对器件设计具有重要意义。

title: Hematite Thin Films Grown on Z-Cut and Y-Cut Lithium Niobate Piezoelectric Substrates by Pulsed Laser Deposition
summary: Altermagnets are a newly identified class of materials that combine advantageous characteristics of both ferro- and antiferromagnets, making them highly promising for spintronic applications. Hematite has recently been identified as an altermagnetic material and exhibits several noteworthy properties, including a high Néel temperature, a temperature dependent spin reorientation transition (SRT) at the Morin temperature ($T_\mathrm{M}$), and low magnetic damping. In this work, we demonstrate the epitaxial growth of hematite thin films on y- and z-cut lithium niobate (LiNbO$_3$) substrates using pulsed laser deposition (PLD). LiNbO$_3$ as piezoelectric substrate is of particular interest as it enables the efficient excitation of surface acoustic waves (SAWs) with interdigital transducers. The different substrate cuts allow for different orientations of the Néel vector. Films grown on y-cut LiNbO3 are single-crystalline and single-phase, while those deposited on z-cut LiNbO$_3$ exhibit two distinct in-plane (ip) domains rotated 60° relative to each other. On both substrates, the hematite thin films exhibit a temperature dependent SRT which allows the antiferromagnetic Néel vector to be controlled. This study paves the way for the development of high-quality piezoelectric/altermagnetic hyprids for magnonics and spintronics.

AI.tldr: 在钽酸锂衬底上外延生长赤铁矿薄膜，研究其作为反铁磁材料的特性，为压电/反铁磁混合器件开发铺平道路
AI.motivation: 赤铁矿作为一种新型反铁磁材料，具有高尼尔温度、低磁阻尼等优异特性，结合压电衬底钽酸锂，可用于开发高性能自旋电子器件
AI.method: 使用脉冲激光沉积技术在y-和z-切钽酸锂衬底上外延生长赤铁矿薄膜，研究其晶体结构和磁学特性
AI.result: y-切衬底上获得单晶单相薄膜，z-切衬底上形成60°旋转的两个面内畴；薄膜均表现出温度依赖的自旋重取向转变，可控制反铁磁尼尔矢量
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了高质量压电/反铁磁混合材料，为磁子学和自旋电子学应用奠定了基础

title: Maskless Electron Beam-Induced Etching of Diamond in Air: A Secondary Electron-Driven Mechanism
summary: We report a direct, maskless electron beam-induced etching (EBIE) process for diamond in air, enabling high-precision patterning without lithography or plasma processing. Through a comprehensive analysis of electron-gas, electron-diamond, and gas-surface interactions in the SEM environment, we demonstrate that etching is predominantly governed by low-energy secondary electrons, which drive gas dissociation and radical generation. The resulting oxygen- and nitrogen-based radicals chemisorb on the diamond surface, form volatile carbon-containing species, and desorb under continued electron irradiation, enabling controlled material removal. The process exhibits two distinct regimes: a molecule-limited regime governed by gas flux and an electron-limited regime controlled by current density. Etch depths up to 212 nm and lateral resolution down to 200 nm are achieved. Time-dependent anisotropy is observed, with (100) surfaces transitioning to (111)-faceted morphologies, enhancing etch yield. These results establish a general secondary electron-driven mechanism for EBIE in gas environments, providing a maskless, damage-free nanofabrication route for diamond semiconductor and other chemically inert materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文报道了一种在空气中无需掩模的电子束诱导刻蚀（EBIE）工艺，用于金刚石的高精度图案化，无需光刻或等离子体处理。
AI.motivation: 开发一种无需掩模、无损伤的纳米加工方法，用于金刚石等化学惰性材料，克服传统光刻和等离子体处理的限制。
AI.method: 通过分析SEM环境中的电子-气体、电子-金刚石和气体-表面相互作用，研究低能二次电子驱动气体解离和自由基生成的机制，实现可控材料去除。
AI.result: 实现了高达212 nm的刻蚀深度和200 nm的横向分辨率，观察到时间依赖性各向异性，(100)表面转变为(111)面形貌，提高了刻蚀产率。
AI.conclusion: 建立了气体环境中EBIE的通用二次电子驱动机制，为金刚石半导体和其他化学惰性材料提供了一种无需掩模、无损伤的纳米加工途径。

title: Grain boundary defects induced Tc increment in MnSi
summary: The rapid advancement of digital technologies necessitates significant progress in functional materials, which are often derived from scarce elements and involve complex manufacturing processes. Additionally, the trend towards miniaturization in high-tech devices has heightened the demand for extremely small components with tailored functionalities. In the domains of ferromagnetic materials, the market is mostly dominated by rare-earth elements-based structures, which are also limited in abundance. In this work, we focus on the microstructure and properties of MnSi. It is a ferromagnetic material with a relatively low Curie temperature (TC) of 30 K. However, our study demonstrates that Tc can be increased by a factor of 4 through careful control of the crystal size. MnSi thin films were synthesized by combining two non-equilibrium techniques: magnetron sputtering and laser annealing. Laser annealing provoked the crystallinity evolution, by heat accumulation, of the barely crystallized films deposited by magnetron sputtering. The laser beam scanning parameters were adjusted to achieve different fluence values, pulse numbers, and pulse frequencies at each point of the film. Films with a crystal size of around 20 nm exhibited a TC of up to 120 K. These properties were obtained under conditions of low fluence and a high number pulse. Local laser impacts were applied to as-deposited samples, enabling spatially controlled crystallization. The interface between the poorly and well-crystallized regions was showcased using high-resolution transmission electron microscopy (HR-TEM). A spatial resolution of approximately 100 μm was achieved. These results demonstrate the strong potential of laser annealing as a versatile and promising approach for the fabrication of miniaturized devices.

AI.tldr: 通过激光退火控制MnSi薄膜晶粒尺寸，可将居里温度从30K提升至120K，实现4倍增长，为微型化器件制造提供新方法。
AI.motivation: 当前功能材料多依赖稀缺稀土元素且制造工艺复杂，同时高科技设备微型化趋势需要具有定制功能的小型组件。铁磁材料市场主要被稀土基结构主导，但稀土资源有限。MnSi作为铁磁材料具有较低居里温度（30K），需要提升其性能。
AI.method: 结合磁控溅射和激光退火两种非平衡技术合成MnSi薄膜。通过调整激光束扫描参数（能量密度、脉冲数、脉冲频率）控制晶体尺寸。采用局部激光处理实现空间可控结晶，使用高分辨率透射电子显微镜（HR-TEM）表征界面结构。
AI.result: 当晶体尺寸约为20nm时，MnSi薄膜的居里温度可提升至120K，是原始材料的4倍。这些性能在低能量密度和高脉冲数条件下获得。实现了约100μm的空间分辨率，展示了激光退火在微型化器件制造中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 激光退火作为一种多功能且有前景的方法，通过精确控制晶体尺寸可显著提升MnSi的居里温度，为制造微型化器件提供了新途径，减少了对稀缺稀土元素的依赖。

title: Intrinsically ultralow thermal conductivity in all-inorganic superatomic bulk crystals
summary: Superatomic compounds, composed of atomic clusters interwoven by weak chemical bonds exhibit large anharmonicity vibrations, are excellent candidates for ultralow thermal conductivity (\k{appa}) materials. However, growing bulk superatomic single crystals is challenging due to complex chemical composition and chemical bonds, and studies on their intrinsic thermal property are scarce. Here, we grew high-quality superatomic single crystals of Re6Se8Te7 and Re6Te15, both of which are narrow band gap semiconductors that change into metals under external physical pressure. At room-temperature, the \k{appa} are 0.32 W m-1 K-1 and 0.53 W m-1 K-1 in Re6Se8Te7 and Re6Te15, respectively, ranking among the lowest value reported in all-inorganic bulk crystals. It is mainly attributed to the large Grüneisen parameter (1.93) and low average sound speed (< 1482 m/s), which are due to soft Te7 nets weakly embedded among the rigid Re6Se8 (Re6Te8) quasi-cubic clusters. The appearance of boson peak, i. e., hump of C(T)/T3, verifies the existence of disordered phonon transports. Besides, the temperature dependence of \k{appa} can be described by classic Debye-Callaway model. Notably, above 350 K, the \k{appa} values of Re6Se8Te7 and Re6Te15 are remarkably close to the upper limit derived from glassy-like diffusion model. This finding sets the superatomic compounds as a promising family for searching ultralow-\k{appa} and energy management materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了超原子化合物Re6Se8Te7和Re6Te15的超低热导率特性，其室温热导率分别为0.32和0.53 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹，在所有无机块体晶体中属于最低值。
AI.motivation: 超原子化合物具有大的非谐振动，是超低热导率材料的理想候选者，但由于复杂的化学成分和化学键，生长块体超原子单晶具有挑战性，对其本征热性质的研究也很少。
AI.method: 生长高质量的Re6Se8Te7和Re6Te15超原子单晶，测量其热导率，分析Grüneisen参数、平均声速，通过C(T)/T³中的玻色峰验证无序声子输运，使用经典Debye-Callaway模型描述热导率温度依赖性。
AI.result: 室温下Re6Se8Te7和Re6Te15的热导率分别为0.32和0.53 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹，在所有无机块体晶体中属于最低值；具有大的Grüneisen参数(1.93)和低平均声速(<1482 m/s)；存在玻色峰证实了无序声子输运；350K以上热导率接近玻璃状扩散模型的上限。
AI.conclusion: 超原子化合物因其超低热导率特性，成为寻找超低热导率和能量管理材料的有前景的家族，软Te7网络弱嵌入刚性Re6Se8(Re6Te8)准立方簇的结构特征导致了优异的热绝缘性能。

title: Quantitative Analysis of Light Induced Ion Segregation in Mixed-Halide Perovskites
comment: accepted for publication in Journal of Applied Crystallography
summary: Mixed-halide perovskites (MHPs) offer good band gap tunability by stoichiometry changes, which is an essential property for the creation of multijunction solar cells. However, under illumination, halide ions in MHP segregate and create I- and Br-rich regions, which decreases the efficiency of potential solar cells. In this work, a method for a detailed investigation of the distribution of halide ions within the MHP during and after illumination is introduced. Calculations of the strain field created by the halide segregation were performed, and the obtained local displacement of atoms was used to calculate the x-ray diffuse scattering. By fitting the experimental data measured on the thin polycrystalline layer of FA0.83Cs0.17Pb(I0.6Br0.4)3 the distribution of Br- and I- ions within an illuminated MHP was determined and the subsequent relaxation process of the segregation in the dark was tracked. Creation of highly Br-rich regions within slightly I-rich volume during the illumination was observed.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过X射线漫散射分析混合卤化物钙钛矿在光照下的卤化物离子分布，揭示了光照诱导的卤化物分离现象及其暗态弛豫过程。
AI.motivation: 混合卤化物钙钛矿具有通过化学计量比调节带隙的能力，这对制造多结太阳能电池至关重要。然而，光照下卤化物离子会发生分离，形成富碘和富溴区域，这会降低太阳能电池的效率。因此需要详细研究光照期间和之后卤化物离子的分布情况。
AI.method: 通过计算卤化物分离产生的应变场，利用原子局部位移计算X射线漫散射。通过拟合FA0.83Cs0.17Pb(I0.6Br0.4)3多晶薄膜的实验数据，确定光照下混合卤化物钙钛矿中Br-和I-离子的分布，并追踪暗态下的弛豫过程。
AI.result: 观察到在光照期间，在轻微富碘的体积内形成了高度富溴的区域。成功确定了光照下卤化物离子的分布，并追踪了暗态下的分离弛豫过程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够详细研究混合卤化物钙钛矿中卤化物离子的分布动态，为理解光照诱导的卤化物分离机制及其对太阳能电池性能的影响提供了重要工具。

title: Role of spatiotemporal nonuniformities in laser-induced magnetization precession damping
summary: Laser-induced magnetization precession measurements in ferromagnets often reveal an anomalous decrease in the damping time near a field-induced second-order spin-orientation transition, a behavior that cannot be described by the linearized Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert equation. Here we demonstrate that this anomaly is not a material property but results from interference of precessing local magnetizations within the inhomogeneously excited region. By combining pump-probe experiments, analytical modeling that accounts for the finite sizes of the pump and probe spots, and micromagnetic simulations, we show that the standard macrospin approach fails to capture the observed dynamics. The inhomogeneous relaxation of magnetic parameters within the excitation area distorts the measured precession envelope, while dipole fields give rise to a temporally non-monotonic term in its frequency. Our results highlight the critical role of excitation locality in a vicinity of critical fields.

AI.tldr: 激光诱导磁化进动测量中观察到的阻尼时间异常减少并非材料特性，而是由激发区域内局部磁化进动的干涉效应引起。
AI.motivation: 解释铁磁体中激光诱导磁化进动测量中观察到的异常现象：在磁场诱导的二阶自旋取向转变附近，阻尼时间异常减少，这无法用线性化的Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程描述。
AI.method: 结合泵浦-探测实验、考虑泵浦和探测光斑有限尺寸的解析建模，以及微磁模拟，分析激发区域内磁化进动的干涉效应。
AI.result: 标准宏自旋方法无法捕捉观察到的动力学行为。激发区域内磁参数的非均匀弛豫会扭曲测量的进动包络，而偶极场会在其频率中产生时间非单调项。
AI.conclusion: 在临界场附近，激发局域性起着关键作用，观察到的异常现象并非材料固有属性，而是由激发区域内局部磁化进动的干涉效应引起。

title: Stable Asymmetric Magnetization Reversal in Epitaxial Co(001)/CoO(001) Bilayer
summary: The exchange bias (EB) in ferromagnetic/antiferromagnetic (FM/AFM) bilayer systems causes a shift of the magnetic hysteresis curve after field cooling through the Néel temperature of the AFM. In some cases, this shift is accompanied by an asymmetry between ascending and descending branches. In the past, this asymmetric magnetization reversal has been studied in different bilayer systems, including polycrystalline Co/CoO thin films. Here we investigate the asymmetric magnetization reversal in an epitaxial fcc-Co(001)/CoO(001) thin film grown on MgO(001) by molecular beam epitaxy at varying temperatures up to room temperature after field cooling along the easy and the hard axes. Room temperature measurements of the longitudinal and transverse magneto-optic Kerr effect show different magnetization reversal processes via stable intermediate states for different angles between external magnetic field and magnetic easy axes. Once the sample is cooled below the blocking temperature, a pronounced asymmetric magnetization reversal can be observed. We show that in contrast to polycrystalline bilayers, the loop asymmetry stays constant after multiple training cycles and that the magnitude of the asymmetry is directly correlated with the magnitude of the EB.

AI.tldr: 研究外延fcc-Co(001)/CoO(001)薄膜中交换偏置引起的非对称磁化反转，发现与多晶体系不同，其非对称性在多次训练循环后保持恒定，且与交换偏置大小直接相关。
AI.motivation: 研究铁磁/反铁磁双层系统中交换偏置引起的磁滞回线非对称反转现象，特别是在外延单晶体系中的行为，以区别于先前研究的多晶体系。
AI.method: 使用分子束外延在MgO(001)衬底上生长外延fcc-Co(001)/CoO(001)薄膜，在不同温度下进行场冷却，沿易轴和难轴方向测量纵向和横向磁光克尔效应。
AI.result: 观察到稳定的中间态磁化反转过程，样品冷却到阻塞温度以下后出现显著的非对称磁化反转。与多晶双层不同，非对称性在多次训练循环后保持恒定，且非对称程度与交换偏置大小直接相关。
AI.conclusion: 外延单晶Co/CoO双层中的非对称磁化反转行为与多晶体系存在本质差异，其非对称性具有稳定性且与交换偏置直接相关，这为理解交换偏置机制提供了新见解。

title: Pentagonal PdTe2 Monolayer for Sustainable Solar-driven Hydrogen Production
summary: This investigation demonstrates that the pentagonal PdTe2 (penta-PdTe2) monolayer is a highly tunable two-dimensional (2D) photocatalyst, characterized by the bandgap of 1.75 eV and high hole mobility. Using density functional theory calculations with the HSE06 functional, we show that tensile strain engineering (particularly at +2% and +3%) is essential for enabling spontaneous water splitting. At these strain values, the valence-band maximum and conduction-band maximum straddle the water redox potentials (H+/H2 and O2/H2O) in both acidic (pH=0) and neutral (pH=7) conditions. The monolayer's low hole effective mass facilitates rapid charge extraction, mitigating recombination and driving the oxygen evolution reaction (OER) more effectively than many hexagonal and pentagonal counterparts. The Gibbs free energy (ΔG) pathways indicate that overpotentials for the hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) and OER are highly sensitive to mechanical deformation, specifically biaxial strain, through which +3% tensile strain, yielding an optimized balance of overpotentials of ηHER = 0.70 V and ηOER = 0.72 V at pH=7. Finally, integrating optical absorption with thermodynamic driving forces results in a Solar-to-Hydrogen (STH) efficiency of 20.40% at pH 7. This exceeds the performance of several previously reported 2D catalysts, positioning penta-PdTe2 as a superior candidate for sustainable, solar-driven hydrogen production.

AI.tldr: 五边形PdTe2单层是一种可调控的二维光催化剂，通过拉伸应变工程实现高效自发水分解，在pH=7条件下太阳能制氢效率达20.40%
AI.motivation: 开发高效、可持续的太阳能驱动制氢催化剂是清洁能源领域的重要目标。二维材料因其独特的电子结构和可调控性成为有前景的光催化剂候选材料。
AI.method: 使用HSE06泛函的密度泛函理论计算，研究五边形PdTe2单层在不同双轴拉伸应变下的电子结构、能带位置、载流子迁移率以及水分解反应的热力学和动力学性质。
AI.result: +2%和+3%拉伸应变使价带顶和导带底跨越水氧化还原电位，实现自发水分解。+3%应变下HER过电位为0.70V，OER过电位为0.72V，太阳能制氢效率达20.40%，优于许多已报道的二维催化剂。
AI.conclusion: 五边形PdTe2单层是一种高度可调控的二维光催化剂，通过应变工程优化其电子结构和反应动力学，在太阳能驱动制氢方面展现出卓越性能，是可持续氢能生产的有力候选材料。

title: Electron-Hole Scattering Dichotomy and Anisotropic Warping in Quasi-Two-Dimensional Fermi Surfaces of UTe2
summary: We present a combined experimental and theoretical study of the detailed Fermi-surface (FS) geometry of UTe2, a heavy-fermion superconductor that has recently attracted considerable attention as a promising candidate for spin-triplet pairing. Using angle-dependent magnetoresistance oscillations, a bulk- and low-energy-sensitive transport probe for quasi-two-dimensional (Q2D) electronic structures, we directly determine the in-plane FS geometry. We found that the Q2D FS exhibits a rectangular cross-sectional shape with strongly anisotropic warping, originating from the hybridization of two orthogonal quasi-one-dimensional bands. Through a quantitative comparison between experiment and theoretical calculations, we further reveal a large electron-hole scattering dichotomy: the quasiparticle lifetime on the electron FS is substantially shorter than that on the hole FS. This dichotomy is naturally explained by anisotropic, low-dimensional antiferromagnetic fluctuations, which selectively enhance scattering on the electron FS. This suggests a dominant role of the electron pockets for the emergence of superconductivity. Our results clarify a direct relation between FS geometry, magnetic fluctuations, and momentum-dependent quasiparticle lifetimes, and thus providing a crucial basis for the microscopic understanding of pairing mechanism, and impose stringent constraints on the gap symmetry of spin-triplet superconductivity in UTe2.

AI.tldr: 通过磁阻振荡实验直接测量UTe2的费米面几何结构，发现其具有矩形截面和强各向异性扭曲，源于两个正交准一维能带的杂化。实验与理论对比揭示电子-空穴散射二分性，电子费米面上的准粒子寿命显著短于空穴费米面，这由低维反铁磁涨落选择性增强电子散射解释，表明电子口袋在超导出现中起主导作用。
AI.motivation: UTe2作为重费米子超导体，是自旋三重态配对的有力候选材料，但其详细的费米面几何结构、准粒子寿命与磁涨落的关系尚不清楚，这些信息对于理解其超导配对机制至关重要。
AI.method: 采用角度依赖磁阻振荡实验（对二维电子结构敏感的体积输运探针）直接确定面内费米面几何结构，结合理论计算进行定量比较，分析准粒子寿命的动量依赖性。
AI.result: 发现准二维费米面具有矩形截面和强各向异性扭曲，源于两个正交准一维能带杂化。揭示电子-空穴散射二分性：电子费米面上的准粒子寿命显著短于空穴费米面，这由低维反铁磁涨落选择性增强电子散射解释。
AI.conclusion: 研究阐明了费米面几何结构、磁涨落和动量依赖准粒子寿命之间的直接关系，为理解UTe2中自旋三重态超导的配对机制提供了关键基础，并对能隙对称性施加了严格约束，表明电子口袋在超导出现中起主导作用。
